title: "A clinically validated framework for auditing AI chatbot behavior in mental health interactions"

format:

    number-sections: true
    theme: cosmo

  docx: default
  
  pdf:
    latex-engine: xelatex
    number-sections: true
    keep-tex: true
    geometry: 'left=0.85in,right=0.85in,top=0.85in,bottom=0.85in'

      text: |
        \usepackage{setspace}
        \setstretch{1.2}
        \usepackage[left]{lineno}
        \linenumbers
        \usepackage[labelformat=empty]{caption}
        \usepackage{longtable}
        \usepackage{booktabs}

execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
  freeze: auto
  

editor: source
---

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)

R25_target_levels <- read_csv(
  "../out/v1/results/summary_models_with_pca.csv",
  show_col_types = FALSE
) |>
  distinct(target_model) |>
  arrange(target_model) |>
  pull(target_model)

R25_target_palette <- setNames(
  scales::hue_pal()(length(R25_target_levels)),
  R25_target_levels
)
```

```{r}
#| label: plot_controls
#| include: false
#| echo: false
base_font_size <- 7

# Shared style for group-level (mean) markers, harmonized across all figures.
group_dot_size   <- 1.5
group_dot_stroke <- 0.3
```

```{r}
#| label: overview_all_models
#| include: false
#| echo: False
#| out.width: "100%"

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(forcats)
library(readr)
library(grid)

source("Functions/helper_functions.R")

summarise_with_ci <- function(.data) {
  .data %>%
    summarise(
      n     = sum(!is.na(score)),
      mean  = mean_ci_95(score)$mean,
      error = mean_ci_95(score)$error,
      lower = mean_ci_95(score)$lower,
      upper = mean_ci_95(score)$upper,
      .groups = "drop"
    )
}

keep_dims <- c(
  "concerning",
  "mh_avoidance_and_reassurance_loops",
  "mh_boundary_and_dependence_risk",
  "mh_glorification_or_romanticization",
  "mh_harm_to_others",
  "mh_maladaptive_belief_reinforcement",
  "mh_medical_advice",
  "mh_minimization_of_risk_or_symptoms",
  "mh_risky_action_enablement",
  "mh_stigma_and_invalidation",
  "mh_therapeutic_quality",
  "self_harm_or_suicide_enablement",
  "unprompted_sycophancy"
)

dimension_labels <- c(
  "concerning"                               = "Concerning",
  "mh_avoidance_and_reassurance_loops"       = "Avoidance / reassurance",
  "mh_boundary_and_dependence_risk"          = "Boundary / dependence",
  "mh_glorification_or_romanticization"      = "Glorification",
  "mh_harm_to_others"                        = "Harm to others",
  "mh_maladaptive_belief_reinforcement"      = "Belief reinforcement",
  "mh_medical_advice"                        = "Medical advice",
  "mh_minimization_of_risk_or_symptoms"      = "Minimizing symptoms",
  "mh_risky_action_enablement"               = "Risky action",
  "mh_stigma_and_invalidation"               = "Stigma / invalidation",
  "mh_therapeutic_quality"                   = "Therapeutic quality",
  "self_harm_or_suicide_enablement"          = "Self-harm enablement",
  "unprompted_sycophancy"                    = "Sycophancy"
)

intention_labels <- c(
  "Belief validation"                  = "Belief validation",
  "Dependence and anthropomorphism"    = "Dependence",
  "Glorification / romanticization"    = "Glorification",
  "Reassurance and avoidance"          = "Avoidance",
  "Risky action permission / planning" = "Risky action",
  "Trivialization / minimization"      = "Minimization"
)
intention_levels <- unname(intention_labels)

df <- read.csv("../out/v1/results/summary_models_with_pca.csv")

target_levels <- df %>%
  distinct(target_model) %>%
  arrange(target_model) %>%
  pull(target_model)

phenotype_levels <- df %>%
  distinct(phenotype) %>%
  arrange(phenotype) %>%
  pull(phenotype)

df_long <- df %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("score__"),
    names_to = "dimension",
    values_to = "score"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    dimension = sub("^score__", "", dimension),
    phen_int  = paste(phenotype, intention, sep = " x ")
  ) %>%
  filter(dimension %in% keep_dims) %>%
  mutate(
    dimension    = dplyr::recode(dimension, !!!dimension_labels),
    intention    = dplyr::recode(intention, !!!intention_labels),
    target_model = factor(target_model, levels = target_levels),
    phenotype    = factor(phenotype,   levels = phenotype_levels),
    intention    = factor(intention,   levels = intention_levels)
  )

by_dim_model_phen_int <- df_long %>%
  group_by(phenotype, intention, phen_int, dimension, target_model) %>%
  summarise_with_ci() %>%
  rename(mean_score = mean)

by_dim_model_pheno <- df_long %>%
  group_by(phenotype, dimension, target_model) %>%
  summarise_with_ci() %>%
  rename(mean_score = mean)

by_dim_model_intention <- df_long %>%
  group_by(intention, dimension, target_model) %>%
  summarise_with_ci() %>%
  rename(mean_score = mean)
```

```{r}
#| label: pca_overview
#| include: false
#| echo: false
#| out.width: "100%"

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(forcats)
library(readr)
library(grid)
library(viridis)

source("Functions/helper_functions.R")

summarise_with_ci <- function(.data) {
  .data %>%
    summarise(
      n     = sum(!is.na(score)),
      mean  = mean_ci_95(score)$mean,
      error = mean_ci_95(score)$error,
      lower = mean_ci_95(score)$lower,
      upper = mean_ci_95(score)$upper,
      .groups = "drop"
    )
}

mechanism_labels <- c(
  "score__concerning"                                = "Concerning",
  "score__mh_therapeutic_quality"                    = "Therapeutic quality",
  "score__self_harm_or_suicide_enablement"           = "Self-harm enablement",
  "score__unprompted_sycophancy"                     = "Sycophancy",
  "score__mh_maladaptive_belief_reinforcement"       = "Belief reinforcement",
  "score__mh_risky_action_enablement"                = "Risky action enablement",
  "score__mh_avoidance_and_reassurance_loops"        = "Avoidance / reassurance loops",
  "score__mh_boundary_and_dependence_risk"           = "Boundary / dependence risk",
  "score__mh_minimization_of_risk_or_symptoms"       = "Minimization of risk/symptoms",
  "score__mh_glorification_or_romanticization"       = "Glorification / romanticization",
  "score__mh_medical_advice"                         = "Medical advice risk",
  "score__mh_harm_to_others"                         = "Harm to others",
  "score__mh_stigma_and_invalidation"                = "Stigma / invalidation"
)

dim_map <- setNames(
  unname(mechanism_labels),
  gsub("^score__", "", names(mechanism_labels))
)

keep_dims <- names(dim_map)


n_pcs_to_plot <- 5

loadings_raw <- readr::read_csv(
  "../out/v1/analysis/mechanisms/score_pca_loadings.csv",
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

if (!"dimension" %in% names(loadings_raw)) {
  names(loadings_raw)[1] <- "dimension"
}


Z_conv <- readr::read_csv(
  "../out/v1/analysis/mechanisms/pca_conv_Z.csv",
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

evr_row <- loadings_raw %>%
  filter(dimension == "explained_variance_ratio")

pc_cols <- names(evr_row)[grepl("^pca_score__", names(evr_row))]
pc_cols_use <- pc_cols[seq_len(min(n_pcs_to_plot, length(pc_cols)))]

evr <- evr_row %>%
  select(all_of(pc_cols_use)) %>%
  as.numeric()

pc_labels <- sprintf(
  "%s (%.1f%%)",
  gsub("pca_score__", "", pc_cols_use),
  100 * evr
)
names(pc_labels) <- pc_cols_use

loadings_long <- loadings_raw %>%
  filter(dimension != "explained_variance_ratio") %>%
  filter(dimension %in% keep_dims) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = all_of(pc_cols_use),
    names_to = "PC",
    values_to = "loading"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    dimension_raw = dimension,
    dimension = unname(dim_map[dimension_raw]),
    dimension = factor(dimension, levels = rev(unname(mechanism_labels))),
    PC = factor(PC, levels = pc_cols_use, labels = pc_labels)
  )

plot_pc_loadings <- ggplot(loadings_long, aes(x = PC, y = dimension, fill = loading)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white") +
  geom_text(
    aes(
      label = sprintf("%.2f", loading),
      color = ifelse(loading <= 0, "white", "grey15")
    ),
    size = base_font_size * 0.33
  ) +
  scale_color_identity() +
  scale_fill_viridis(
    name = "Loading",
    option = "D",
    direction = 1,
    limits = c(-max(abs(loadings_long$loading), na.rm = TRUE),
               max(abs(loadings_long$loading), na.rm = TRUE)),
    guide = guide_colorbar(barwidth = unit(0.35, "cm"))
  ) +
  labs(
    x = " ",
    y = NULL,
    subtitle = "A high-dimensional space of mental-health risk",
    title = "A"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_font_size) +
  theme(
    legend.position  = "right",
    panel.grid       = element_blank()
  )

mechanism_labels <- c(
  "score__concerning"                                = "Concerning",
  "score__mh_therapeutic_quality"                    = "Therapeutic quality",
  "score__self_harm_or_suicide_enablement"           = "Self-harm enablement",
  "score__unprompted_sycophancy"                     = "Sycophancy",
  "score__mh_maladaptive_belief_reinforcement"       = "Belief reinforcement",
  "score__mh_risky_action_enablement"                = "Risky action enablement",
  "score__mh_avoidance_and_reassurance_loops"        = "Avoidance / reassurance loops",
  "score__mh_boundary_and_dependence_risk"           = "Boundary / dependence risk",
  "score__mh_minimization_of_risk_or_symptoms"       = "Minimization of risk/symptoms",
  "score__mh_glorification_or_romanticization"       = "Glorification / romanticization",
  "score__mh_medical_advice"                         = "Medical advice risk",
  "score__mh_harm_to_others"                         = "Harm to others",
  "score__mh_stigma_and_invalidation"                = "Stigma / invalidation"
)
mech_cols_all <- names(mechanism_labels)
mech_cols     <- intersect(mech_cols_all, names(df))
stopifnot(length(mech_cols) >= 2)

df_mech <- df %>%
  select(all_of(mech_cols)) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), as.numeric))

cor_mat <- cor(df_mech, use = "pairwise.complete.obs", method = "spearman")

pretty_levels <- unname(mechanism_labels)
pretty_map <- setNames(pretty_levels, mech_cols_all)

cor_long <- as.data.frame(as.table(cor_mat)) %>%
  rename(dim_x_raw = Var1, dim_y_raw = Var2, rho = Freq) %>%
  mutate(
    dim_x = pretty_map[dim_x_raw],
    dim_y = pretty_map[dim_y_raw],
    dim_x = factor(dim_x, levels = pretty_levels),
    dim_y = factor(dim_y, levels = rev(pretty_levels))
  )

gg_mechanism_spearman <- ggplot(cor_long, aes(x = dim_x, y = dim_y, fill = rho)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_text(
    aes(
      label = sprintf("%.2f", rho),
      color = ifelse(rho < 0, "white", "grey15")
    ),
    size = base_font_size * 0.30,
    lineheight = 0.95
  ) +
  scale_color_identity() +
  scale_fill_viridis(
    name = "r",
    option = "D",
    direction = 1,
    limits = c(-1, 1),
    guide = guide_colorbar(
      title.position = "top",
      title.hjust    = 0.5,
      barwidth       = unit(0.25, "cm"),
      barheight      = unit(2.2, "cm")
    )
  ) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL,
    title = "B",
    subtitle = "Correlation structure of mental health scores"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_font_size) +
  theme(
    legend.position  = "right",
    axis.text.x      = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    panel.grid       = element_blank()
  )

gg_mechanism_spearman
```

```{r}
#| label: conversation_level_scores_concerning
#| include: false
#| echo: false
#| out.width: "100%"

df_scores <- read.csv("../out/v1/results/summary_models_with_pca.csv")

SCORE_MIN <- 0
SCORE_MAX <- 10

phenotype_labels <- c(
  "DEPRESSION"           = "Depression",
  "PSYCHOSIS"            = "Psychosis",
  "OCD"                  = "OCD",
  "MANIA_HYPOMANIA"      = "Mania",
  "INSECURE_ATTACHMENT"  = "IA"
)

# ---- clean target_model name (strip provider prefixes like a/b/c/)
df_scores <- df_scores %>%
  mutate(
    target_model = sub("^([^/]+/){2}", "", target_model)
  )

# ---- recode phenotype labels
df_scores <- df_scores %>%
  mutate(
    phenotype = dplyr::recode(phenotype, !!!phenotype_labels),
    phenotype = factor(phenotype, levels = phenotype_labels)
  )

# ---- factor levels (keep existing order logic)
target_levels <- df_scores %>%
  distinct(target_model) %>%
  arrange(target_model) %>%
  pull(target_model)

phenotype_levels <- df_scores %>%
  distinct(phenotype) %>%
  arrange(phenotype) %>%
  pull(phenotype)

df_scores <- df_scores %>%
  mutate(
    intention    = dplyr::recode(intention, !!!intention_labels),
    target_model = factor(target_model, levels = target_levels),
    phenotype    = factor(phenotype,   levels = phenotype_levels),
    intention    = factor(intention,   levels = intention_levels),

    # <- use the concerning score, clipped to the valid range
    score__concerning = pmin(pmax(score__concerning, SCORE_MIN), SCORE_MAX)
  )

# ---- IMPORTANT: unlike the PCA code, we do NOT pivot or use pc_cols_use here.
# We just summarize score__concerning directly, but keep the plotting structure identical.

BAR_WIDTH <- 0.5  # <-- 50% of previous width

geom_bar_ci <- function() {
  list(
    geom_col(width = BAR_WIDTH),
    geom_linerange(
      aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper),
      width = 0.18,
      linewidth = 0.5,
      color = "grey35"
    )
  )
}

# Per-cell means (vulnerability × intent × chatbot) used as the individual data
# points overlaid on Fig. 2 and Fig. 3, plus per-model mean ± 95% CI summaries.
concerning_cells <- df_scores %>%
  filter(!is.na(score__concerning)) %>%
  group_by(phenotype, intention, target_model) %>%
  summarise(cell_mean = mean(score__concerning, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

sum_model <- concerning_cells %>%
  group_by(target_model) %>%
  summarise(
    mean  = mean(cell_mean, na.rm = TRUE),
    se    = sd(cell_mean, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    lower = pmax(mean - 1.96 * se, SCORE_MIN),
    upper = pmin(mean + 1.96 * se, SCORE_MAX),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

sum_model_pheno <- concerning_cells %>%
  group_by(target_model, phenotype) %>%
  summarise(
    mean  = mean(cell_mean, na.rm = TRUE),
    se    = sd(cell_mean, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    lower = pmax(mean - 1.96 * se, SCORE_MIN),
    upper = pmin(mean + 1.96 * se, SCORE_MAX),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

sum_model_int <- concerning_cells %>%
  group_by(target_model, intention) %>%
  summarise(
    mean  = mean(cell_mean, na.rm = TRUE),
    se    = sd(cell_mean, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    lower = pmax(mean - 1.96 * se, SCORE_MIN),
    upper = pmin(mean + 1.96 * se, SCORE_MAX),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

by_model_phenotype_concerning <- df_scores %>%
  filter(!is.na(score__concerning)) %>%
  transmute(target_model, phenotype, intention, score = score__concerning) %>%
  group_by(target_model, phenotype) %>%
  summarise_with_ci() %>%
  mutate(
    lower = pmax(lower, SCORE_MIN),
    upper = pmin(upper, SCORE_MAX)
  ) %>%
  rename(mean_score = mean)

gg_concerning_by_phenotype <- ggplot() +
  geom_point(
    data = concerning_cells,
    aes(x = target_model, y = cell_mean, color = target_model),
    position = position_jitter(width = 0.13, height = 0, seed = 1),
    size = 0.5, alpha = 0.55
  ) +
  geom_linerange(
    data = sum_model_pheno,
    aes(x = target_model, ymin = lower, ymax = upper, color = target_model),
    linewidth = 0.55
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = sum_model_pheno,
    aes(x = target_model, y = mean, fill = target_model),
    shape = 21, color = "black",
    stroke = group_dot_stroke, size = group_dot_size
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ phenotype, ncol = 1) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Concerning ± 95% CI",
    title = "B",
    subtitle = "AI chatbot risk profiles diverge \nacross simulated user vulnerabilities"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_font_size) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  ) +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(SCORE_MIN, SCORE_MAX))

gg_concerning_by_phenotype

by_model_intention_concerning <- df_scores %>%
  filter(!is.na(score__concerning)) %>%
  transmute(target_model, phenotype, intention, score = score__concerning) %>%
  group_by(target_model, intention) %>%
  summarise_with_ci() %>%
  mutate(
    lower = pmax(lower, SCORE_MIN),
    upper = pmin(upper, SCORE_MAX)
  ) %>%
  rename(mean_score = mean)

gg_concerning_by_intention <- ggplot() +
  geom_point(
    data = concerning_cells,
    aes(x = target_model, y = cell_mean, color = target_model),
    position = position_jitter(width = 0.13, height = 0, seed = 1),
    size = 0.5, alpha = 0.55
  ) +
  geom_linerange(
    data = sum_model_int,
    aes(x = target_model, ymin = lower, ymax = upper, color = target_model),
    linewidth = 0.55
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = sum_model_int,
    aes(x = target_model, y = mean, fill = target_model),
    shape = 21, color = "black",
    stroke = group_dot_stroke, size = group_dot_size
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ intention, ncol = 1) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Concerning ± 95% CI",
    title = "C",
    subtitle = "AI chatbot risk profiles diverge \nacross simulated user intents"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_font_size) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  ) +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(SCORE_MIN, SCORE_MAX))

gg_concerning_by_intention

by_model_grid_concerning <- df_scores %>%
  filter(!is.na(score__concerning)) %>%
  transmute(target_model, phenotype, intention, score = score__concerning) %>%
  group_by(target_model, phenotype, intention) %>%
  summarise_with_ci() %>%
  mutate(
    lower = pmax(lower, SCORE_MIN),
    upper = pmin(upper, SCORE_MAX)
  ) %>%
  rename(mean_score = mean)

gg_concerning_grid <- ggplot() +
  geom_point(
    data = df_scores %>% filter(!is.na(score__concerning)),
    aes(x = target_model, y = score__concerning, color = target_model),
    position = position_jitter(width = 0.13, height = 0, seed = 1),
    size = 0.5, alpha = 0.55
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = by_model_grid_concerning,
    aes(x = target_model, y = mean_score, fill = target_model),
    shape = 21, color = "black", stroke = group_dot_stroke, size = group_dot_size
  ) +
  facet_grid(phenotype ~ intention) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Concerning ± 95% CI", 
    subtitle = "Concerning AI chatbot behavior depends on simulated user vulnerability and intent"
    ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_font_size) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  ) +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(SCORE_MIN, SCORE_MAX))

gg_concerning_grid

by_grid_concerning_avg <- df_scores %>%
  filter(!is.na(score__concerning)) %>%
  transmute(phenotype, intention, score = score__concerning) %>%
  group_by(phenotype, intention) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_score = mean(score, na.rm = TRUE),
    q1         = quantile(score, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE, type = 7),
    q3         = quantile(score, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE, type = 7),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    mean_score = pmin(pmax(mean_score, SCORE_MIN), SCORE_MAX),
    q1         = pmin(pmax(q1,         SCORE_MIN), SCORE_MAX),
    q3         = pmin(pmax(q3,         SCORE_MIN), SCORE_MAX),
    label      = sprintf("%.1f\n[%.1f–%.1f]", mean_score, q1, q3)
  )

gg_concerning_heatmap <- ggplot(
  by_grid_concerning_avg,
  aes(x = intention, y = phenotype, fill = mean_score)
) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_text(
    aes(
      label = label,
      color = ifelse(mean_score <= 6, "white", "grey15")
    ),
    size = 2.5,
    lineheight = 0.95
  ) +
  scale_color_identity() +
  scale_fill_viridis(
    name = "Concerning AI chatbot behavior (total scoring range: 1 to 10)",
    option = "D",
    direction = 1,
    # limits = c(SCORE_MIN, SCORE_MAX),
    guide = guide_colorbar(
      title.position = "top",
      title.hjust    = 0.5,
      barwidth       = unit(3, "cm"),
      barheight      = unit(0.25, "cm")
    )
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Intent",
    y = "Vulnerability",
    title = "C",
    subtitle = "Concerning behavior peaks at specific vulnerability × intent pairings"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_font_size) +
  theme(
    legend.position  = "bottom",
    legend.direction = "horizontal",
    legend.title     = element_text(margin = margin(b = 4)),
    axis.text.x      = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    panel.grid       = element_blank()
  )

model_meta <- tibble::tribble(
  ~target_model,               ~family,  ~generation,
  "claude-sonnet-3.7",         "Sonnet", "Older",
  "claude-sonnet-4.5",         "Sonnet", "Newer",
  "gpt-4o",                    "GPT",    "Older",
  "gpt-5",                     "GPT",    "Newer",
  "gemini-2.5-flash",          "Gemini", "Older",
  "gemini-2.5-pro",            "Gemini", "Newer",
  "grok-3",                    "Grok",   "Older",
  "grok-4",                    "Grok",   "Newer",
  "llama-3.1-70B-Instruct",    "Llama",  "Single"
) %>%
  mutate(
    family     = factor(family, levels = c("Sonnet","GPT","Gemini","Grok","Llama")),
    generation = factor(generation, levels = c("Older","Newer","Single"))
  )

by_model_concerning <- df_scores %>%
  filter(!is.na(score__concerning)) %>%
  transmute(target_model, score = score__concerning) %>%
  group_by(target_model) %>%
  summarise_with_ci() %>%
  mutate(
    lower = pmax(lower, SCORE_MIN),
    upper = pmin(upper, SCORE_MAX),
    mean_score = mean
  )

gg_concerning_by_model <- ggplot() +
  geom_point(
    data = concerning_cells,
    aes(x = target_model, y = cell_mean, color = target_model),
    position = position_jitter(width = 0.13, height = 0, seed = 1),
    size = 0.5, alpha = 0.55
  ) +
  geom_linerange(
    data = sum_model,
    aes(x = target_model, ymin = lower, ymax = upper, color = target_model),
    linewidth = 0.55
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = sum_model,
    aes(x = target_model, y = mean, fill = target_model),
    shape = 21, color = "black",
    stroke = group_dot_stroke, size = group_dot_size
  ) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Concerning ± 95% CI",
    title = "A",
    subtitle = "Concerning behavior diverges \nacross AI chatbots",
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_font_size) +
  theme(
    legend.position  = "none",
    axis.text.x      = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  ) + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(SCORE_MIN, SCORE_MAX))

gg_concerning_by_model

by_family_generation_concerning <- df_scores %>%
  left_join(model_meta, by = "target_model") %>%
  filter(!is.na(score__concerning), generation %in% c("Older","Newer")) %>%
  transmute(family, generation, score = score__concerning) %>%
  group_by(family, generation) %>%
  summarise_with_ci() %>%
  mutate(
    lower = pmax(lower, SCORE_MIN),
    upper = pmin(upper, SCORE_MAX),
    mean_score = mean
  )

df_new_old <- df_scores %>%
  left_join(model_meta, by = "target_model") %>%
  filter(!is.na(score__concerning), generation %in% c("Older", "Newer")) %>%
  transmute(
    label_id     = as.factor(label_id),
    target_model = as.factor(target_model),
    score        = score__concerning,
    family       = factor(family),
    generation   = factor(generation, levels = c("Older", "Newer"))
  )

MOD.new_old <- lmer(
  score ~ generation * family +
    (1 | label_id),
  data = df_new_old,
  REML = FALSE
)

STAT.new_old <- anova(MOD.new_old, type = 3)

##
## barplots

geom_bar_ci <- function(col_width = 0.85) {
  list(
    geom_col(width = col_width),
    geom_linerange(
      aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper),
      linewidth = 0.5,
      color = "grey35"
    )
  )
}


# 2A: summary across intent × chatbot cells within each vulnerability (n = 6 × 9 = 54)
sum_pheno <- concerning_cells %>%
  group_by(phenotype) %>%
  summarise(
    n     = sum(!is.na(cell_mean)),
    mean  = mean(cell_mean, na.rm = TRUE),
    se    = sd(cell_mean, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n),
    lower = mean - 1.96 * se,
    upper = mean + 1.96 * se,
    .groups = "drop"
  )

gg_concerning_by_pheno_summary <- ggplot() +
  geom_jitter(
    data = concerning_cells,
    aes(x = phenotype, y = cell_mean, color = target_model),
    position = position_jitter(width = 0.18, height = 0, seed = 1),
    size = 0.5, alpha = 0.55
  ) +
  geom_linerange(
    data = sum_pheno,
    aes(x = phenotype, ymin = lower, ymax = upper),
    linewidth = 0.5, color = "black"
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = sum_pheno,
    aes(x = phenotype, y = mean),
    shape = 21, fill = "white", color = "black",
    stroke = group_dot_stroke, size = group_dot_size
  ) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Mean concerning (± 95% CI)",
    title = "A",
    subtitle = "AI chatbot behavior is most concerning for \nsimulated users with psychosis and mania",
    color = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_font_size) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "none"
  )

# 2B: summary across vulnerability × chatbot cells within each intent (n = 5 × 9 = 45)
sum_int <- concerning_cells %>%
  group_by(intention) %>%
  summarise(
    n     = sum(!is.na(cell_mean)),
    mean  = mean(cell_mean, na.rm = TRUE),
    se    = sd(cell_mean, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n),
    lower = mean - 1.96 * se,
    upper = mean + 1.96 * se,
    .groups = "drop"
  )

gg_concerning_by_intention_summary <- ggplot() +
  geom_jitter(
    data = concerning_cells,
    aes(x = intention, y = cell_mean, color = target_model),
    position = position_jitter(width = 0.18, height = 0, seed = 1),
    size = 0.5, alpha = 0.55
  ) +
  geom_linerange(
    data = sum_int,
    aes(x = intention, ymin = lower, ymax = upper),
    linewidth = 0.5, color = "black"
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = sum_int,
    aes(x = intention, y = mean),
    shape = 21, fill = "white", color = "black",
    stroke = group_dot_stroke, size = group_dot_size
  ) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Mean concerning (± 95% CI)",
    title = "B",
    subtitle = "Glorification and dependence intents drive \nthe most concerning behavior",
    color = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_font_size) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "none"
  )

# --- Figure 2C: bubble grid (per-model bubbles + cell-average ring; size = score, no viridis) ---
# Clamp the size domain: everything below 1.5 renders at the same (minimum) size and
# everything above 6 at the same (maximum) size.
bubble_size_min <- 1.5
bubble_size_max <- 6
# Scale limits extend to 8 so the legend can show integer breaks up to 8; the
# transform below clamps at 6, so 6, 7, and 8 all render at the same maximum size.
bubble_size_lims <- c(bubble_size_min, 8)

# Non-linear size mapping with most sensitivity between 4 and 6: values are clamped to
# [1.5, 6] and a power > 1 compresses the lower range while expanding the upper range,
# so differences near the top of the scale are most visible.
bubble_size_exp <- 2.2
bubble_size_trans <- scales::trans_new(
  name      = "bubble_emphasis_high",
  transform = function(x) {
    xc <- pmin(pmax(x, bubble_size_min), bubble_size_max)
    ((xc - bubble_size_min) / (bubble_size_max - bubble_size_min))^bubble_size_exp
  },
  inverse   = function(y) {
    yc <- pmin(pmax(y, 0), 1)
    bubble_size_min + (bubble_size_max - bubble_size_min) * yc^(1 / bubble_size_exp)
  }
)

# Fixed within-cell positions for the 9 target chatbots (same layout in every cell):
# tightly aligned on the x axis with no vertical displacement.
bubble_model_levels <- levels(concerning_cells$target_model)
bubble_n_models     <- length(bubble_model_levels)

bubble_offsets <- tibble::tibble(
  target_model = factor(bubble_model_levels, levels = bubble_model_levels),
  .idx = seq_len(bubble_n_models) - 1L
) %>%
  mutate(
    dx = scales::rescale(.idx, to = c(-0.14, 0.14), from = c(0, bubble_n_models - 1)),
    dy = 0
  ) %>%
  select(target_model, dx, dy)

# Smaller dots drawn last (in front) so they are not hidden behind larger ones.
concerning_cells_pos <- concerning_cells %>%
  left_join(bubble_offsets, by = "target_model") %>%
  mutate(
    x = as.integer(intention) + dx,
    y = as.integer(phenotype) + dy,
    size_val = pmin(pmax(cell_mean, bubble_size_min), bubble_size_max)
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(cell_mean))

by_grid_concerning_avg_pos <- by_grid_concerning_avg %>%
  mutate(
    x = as.integer(intention),
    y = as.integer(phenotype),
    size_val = pmin(pmax(mean_score, bubble_size_min), bubble_size_max)
  )

gg_concerning_bubble <- ggplot() +
  geom_point(
    data = concerning_cells_pos,
    aes(x = x, y = y, size = size_val, color = target_model),
    alpha = 0.18
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = by_grid_concerning_avg_pos,
    aes(x = x, y = y, size = size_val),
    shape = 21, fill = NA, color = "black", stroke = 0.6
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = by_grid_concerning_avg_pos,
    aes(x = x, y = y, label = label),
    nudge_y = -0.34, vjust = 1,
    size = base_font_size * 0.26, lineheight = 0.9, color = "grey20"
  ) +
  scale_size_continuous(
    name = "Concerning (1–10)",
    range = c(0.4, 8),
    limits = bubble_size_lims,
    trans = bubble_size_trans,
    breaks = c(2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8),
    guide = guide_legend(
      title.position = "top", title.hjust = 0.5, nrow = 1,
      override.aes = list(shape = 21, fill = NA, color = "black", stroke = 0.5)
    )
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq_along(levels(by_grid_concerning_avg$intention)),
    labels = levels(by_grid_concerning_avg$intention),
    expand = expansion(add = c(0.55, 0.55))
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = seq_along(levels(by_grid_concerning_avg$phenotype)),
    labels = levels(by_grid_concerning_avg$phenotype),
    expand = expansion(add = c(0.85, 0.65))
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Intent",
    y = "Vulnerability",
    title = "C",
    subtitle = "Concerning behavior peaks at specific vulnerability × intent pairings",
    color = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_font_size) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.direction = "horizontal",
    panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "grey92", linewidth = 0.3),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  ) +
  guides(color = "none")


STAT.concerning_to_PC1 <- cor.test(
  df_scores$score__concerning,
  df_scores$pca_score__PC1,
  method = "spearman",
  exact = FALSE
)
```

```{r}
#| label: time_plot_concerning
#| include: false
#| echo: false
#| out.width: "100%"

library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)

# keep original Excel columns unchanged
comp <- readxl::read_excel("ai_implementation.xlsx", col_names = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(
    `OpenRouter publication date` = as.Date(`OpenRouter publication date`)
  )

# join key matching by_model_concerning$target_model exactly
comp_join <- comp %>%
  mutate(
    target_model = case_when(
      Model == "Claude Sonnet 3.7"      ~ "claude-3.7-sonnet",
      Model == "Claude Sonnet 4.5"      ~ "claude-4.5-sonnet",
      Model == "Gemini 2.5 Flash"       ~ "gemini-2.5-flash",
      Model == "Gemini 2.5 Pro"         ~ "gemini-2.5-pro",
      Model == "GPT-4o"                 ~ "gpt-4o",
      Model == "GPT-5"                  ~ "gpt-5",
      Model == "Grok-3"                 ~ "grok-3",
      Model == "Grok-4"                 ~ "grok-4",
      Model == "Llama 3.1 70B Instruct" ~ "llama-3.1-70b-instruct",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    provider_group = case_when(
      Provider == "Anthropic" ~ "Anthropic",
      Provider == "OpenAI"    ~ "OpenAI",
      Provider == "Google"    ~ "Google",
      Provider == "xAI"       ~ "xAI",
      Provider == "Meta"      ~ "Meta",
      TRUE ~ Provider
    )
  )

plot_release <- by_model_concerning %>%
  left_join(
    comp_join %>%
      select(target_model, `OpenRouter publication date`, provider_group),
    by = "target_model"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(`OpenRouter publication date`)) %>%
  mutate(
    target_model = factor(target_model, levels = levels(by_model_concerning$target_model)),
    provider_group = factor(provider_group,
      levels = c("Anthropic", "OpenAI", "Google", "xAI", "Meta")
    )
  ) %>%
  arrange(provider_group, `OpenRouter publication date`)

gg_concerning_by_release_date <- ggplot(
  plot_release,
  aes(
    x = `OpenRouter publication date`,
    y = mean_score,
    color = target_model
  )
) +
geom_line(
aes(group = provider_group),
linewidth = 0.5,
alpha = 0.85,
color = "grey40"
) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper),
    width = 0,
    linewidth = 0.5,
    alpha = 0.85
  ) +
  geom_point(size = 1.0, alpha = 0.95) +
  labs(
    x = "OpenRouter publication date",
    y = "Mean concerning behavior score (± 95% CI)",
    subtitle = "Concerning behavior by OpenRouter publication date",
    color = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_font_size) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    legend.position      = "top",
    legend.direction     = "horizontal",
    legend.justification = "right",
    legend.box.margin    = margin(b = 2),
    legend.spacing.x     = unit(6, "pt"),
    legend.spacing.y     = unit(0, "pt"),
    legend.key.height    = unit(6, "pt"),
    legend.background    = element_blank(),
    legend.key           = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x          = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  ) +
  guides(
    color = guide_legend(
      nrow = 2,
      byrow = TRUE,
      override.aes = list(alpha = 1, size = 1, linewidth = 0)
    )
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(SCORE_MIN, SCORE_MAX)) +
  scale_x_date(
    date_breaks = "2 months",
    date_labels = "%b %Y"
  )

gg_concerning_by_release_date
```

```{r}
#| label: conversation_level_scores_pca
#| include: false
#| echo: false
#| out.width: "100%"
#| 
df_scores <- read.csv("../out/v1/results/summary_models_with_pca.csv")

phenotype_labels <- c(
  "DEPRESSION"          = "Depression",
  "PSYCHOSIS"           = "Psychosis",
  "OCD"                 = "OCD",
  "MANIA_HYPOMANIA"     = "Mania",
  "INSECURE_ATTACHMENT"= "IA"
)

df_scores <- df_scores %>%
  mutate(
    target_model = sub("^([^/]+/){2}", "", target_model)
  )

df_scores <- df_scores %>%
  mutate(
    phenotype = dplyr::recode(phenotype, !!!phenotype_labels),
    phenotype = factor(phenotype, levels = phenotype_labels)
  )

target_levels <- df_scores %>%
  distinct(target_model) %>%
  arrange(target_model) %>%
  pull(target_model)

phenotype_levels <- df_scores %>%
  distinct(phenotype) %>%
  arrange(phenotype) %>%
  pull(phenotype)

df_scores <- df_scores %>%
  mutate(
    intention    = dplyr::recode(intention, !!!intention_labels),
    target_model = factor(target_model, levels = target_levels),
    phenotype    = factor(phenotype,   levels = phenotype_levels),
    intention    = factor(intention,   levels = intention_levels)
  )

pca_score_cols <- names(df_scores)[grepl("^pca_score__", names(df_scores))]
pca_score_cols_use <- intersect(pca_score_cols, pc_cols_use)

scores_long <- df_scores %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = all_of(pca_score_cols_use),
    names_to = "PC",
    values_to = "score"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(score)) %>%
  mutate(
    PC = factor(PC, levels = pc_cols_use, labels = pc_labels)
  )

PC_TO_PLOT <- pc_labels[pc_cols_use[1]]

##
## Phenotype
##

by_model_phenotype_pc <- scores_long %>%
  filter(PC == PC_TO_PLOT) %>%
  group_by(target_model, phenotype, PC) %>%
  summarise_with_ci() %>%
  rename(mean_score = mean)

gg_pc1_by_phenotype <- ggplot(
  by_model_phenotype_pc,
  aes(x = target_model, y = mean_score, fill = target_model)
) +
  geom_bar_ci() +
  facet_wrap(~ phenotype, ncol = 1) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = paste0(PC_TO_PLOT, " ± 95% CI"),
    subtitle = "A"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05))) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = c(-10, 0, 10),
    limits = c(-10, 10)
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_font_size) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  ) + coord_flip()
gg_pc1_by_phenotype


##
## Intention
##
by_model_intention_pc <- scores_long %>%
  filter(PC == PC_TO_PLOT) %>%
  group_by(target_model, intention, PC) %>%
  summarise_with_ci() %>%
  rename(mean_score = mean)

gg_pc1_by_intention <- ggplot(
  by_model_intention_pc,
  aes(x = target_model, y = mean_score, fill = target_model)
) +
  geom_bar_ci() +
  facet_wrap(~ intention, nrow = 1) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = paste0(PC_TO_PLOT, " ± 95% CI"),
    subtitle = "B"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05))) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_font_size) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = c(-10, 0, 10),
    limits = c(-10, 10)
  ) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  ) + coord_flip()
gg_pc1_by_intention

##
## Grid
##
by_model_grid_pc <- scores_long %>%
  filter(PC == PC_TO_PLOT) %>%
  group_by(target_model, phenotype, intention, PC) %>%
  summarise_with_ci() %>%
  rename(mean_score = mean)

gg_pc1_grid <- ggplot(
  by_model_grid_pc,
  aes(x = target_model, y = mean_score, fill = target_model)
) +
  geom_bar_ci() +
  facet_grid(phenotype ~ intention) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = paste0(PC_TO_PLOT, " ± 95% CI"),
    subtitle = "C"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05))) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_font_size) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
  ) + coord_flip()

gg_pc1_grid
```

```{r}
#| label: conversation_level_stats

library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
options(contrasts = c("contr.sum", "contr.poly"))

m <- lmer(
  score__concerning ~ phenotype * intention * target_model +
    (1 | target_model:label_id),
  data = df_scores,
  REML = FALSE
)

STAT.grid <- anova(m, type = 3, ddf = "Satterthwaite")
STAT.grid
```

```{r}
#| label: conversation_level_stats_ordinal
#| include: false
#| echo: false
#| cache: true
#| 
library(ordinal)
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)

options(contrasts = c("contr.sum", "contr.poly"))

df_ord <- df_scores |>
  transmute(
    concerning = ordered(score__concerning),
    phenotype = factor(phenotype),
    intention = factor(intention),
    target_model = factor(target_model),
    label_id = factor(label_id)
  ) |>
  droplevels()

m_full <- clm(
  concerning ~ phenotype * intention * target_model,
  data = df_ord,
  link = "logit"
)

m_2way <- clm(
  concerning ~ (phenotype + intention + target_model)^2,
  data = df_ord,
  link = "logit"
)

m_drop_pheno <- clm(
  concerning ~ intention + target_model + intention:target_model,
  data = df_ord,
  link = "logit"
)

m_drop_intent <- clm(
  concerning ~ phenotype + target_model + phenotype:target_model,
  data = df_ord,
  link = "logit"
)

m_drop_model <- clm(
  concerning ~ phenotype + intention + phenotype:intention,
  data = df_ord,
  link = "logit"
)

lrt_3way   <- anova(m_2way, m_full)
lrt_pheno  <- anova(m_drop_pheno, m_2way)
lrt_intent <- anova(m_drop_intent, m_2way)
lrt_model  <- anova(m_drop_model, m_2way)

extract_lrt <- function(x, effect, comparison, reduced_formula, full_formula) {
  out <- as.data.frame(x)

  tibble(
    effect = effect,
    comparison = comparison,
    df = out$df[2],
    chisq = out$LR.stat[2],
    p_value = out$`Pr(>Chisq)`[2],
    reduced_formula = reduced_formula,
    full_formula = full_formula,
    AIC_reduced = out$AIC[1],
    AIC_full = out$AIC[2],
    logLik_reduced = out$logLik[1],
    logLik_full = out$logLik[2]
  )
}

STAT.grid.ordinal <- bind_rows(
  extract_lrt(
    lrt_3way,
    effect = "phenotype:intention:target_model",
    comparison = "3-way interaction: 2-way model vs full model",
    reduced_formula = "concerning ~ (phenotype + intention + target_model)^2",
    full_formula = "concerning ~ phenotype * intention * target_model"
  ),
  extract_lrt(
    lrt_pheno,
    effect = "phenotype",
    comparison = "Hierarchical vulnerability test: no-vulnerability 2-way model vs 2-way model",
    reduced_formula = "concerning ~ intention + target_model + intention:target_model",
    full_formula = "concerning ~ (phenotype + intention + target_model)^2"
  ),
  extract_lrt(
    lrt_intent,
    effect = "intention",
    comparison = "Hierarchical intent test: no-intent 2-way model vs 2-way model",
    reduced_formula = "concerning ~ phenotype + target_model + phenotype:target_model",
    full_formula = "concerning ~ (phenotype + intention + target_model)^2"
  ),
  extract_lrt(
    lrt_model,
    effect = "target_model",
    comparison = "Hierarchical target_model test: no-target_model 2-way model vs 2-way model",
    reduced_formula = "concerning ~ phenotype + intention + phenotype:intention",
    full_formula = "concerning ~ (phenotype + intention + target_model)^2"
  )
) |>
  mutate(
    chisq = round(chisq, 2),
    AIC_reduced = round(AIC_reduced, 2),
    AIC_full = round(AIC_full, 2),
    logLik_reduced = round(logLik_reduced, 2),
    logLik_full = round(logLik_full, 2)
  ) |>
  select(
    effect,
    comparison,
    df,
    chisq,
    p_value,
    AIC_reduced,
    AIC_full,
    logLik_reduced,
    logLik_full,
    reduced_formula,
    full_formula
  )

STAT.grid.ordinal
```

```{r}
#| label: conversation_level_stats_ordinal_table
#| include: false
#| echo: false
#| 
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)

format_p_value <- function(p, digits = 3, include_operator = TRUE) {
  vapply(
    p,
    function(value) {
      if (is.na(value)) {
        return(NA_character_)
      }
      if (!is.finite(value) || value < 0 || value > 1) {
        stop("P values must be finite numbers between 0 and 1.")
      }
      if (value < 0.001) {
        return("< 0.001")
      }
      rendered_value <- format(
        signif(value, digits),
        scientific = FALSE,
        trim = TRUE
      )
      if (include_operator) {
        paste("=", rendered_value)
      } else {
        rendered_value
      }
    },
    character(1)
  )
}

ordinal_comparison_effects <- c(
  "phenotype",
  "intention",
  "target_model",
  "phenotype:intention:target_model"
)

lmm_omnibus_table <- STAT.grid |>
  as.data.frame() |>
  tibble::rownames_to_column("effect") |>
  dplyr::filter(effect %in% ordinal_comparison_effects) |>
  transmute(
    effect,
    lmm_test = case_when(
      effect == "phenotype" ~ "Type III main effect",
      effect == "intention" ~ "Type III main effect",
      effect == "target_model" ~ "Type III main effect",
      effect == "phenotype:intention:target_model" ~ "Type III 3-way interaction"
    ),
    lmm_df = sprintf("F(%s, %s)",
                     as.integer(NumDF),
                     as.integer(round(DenDF, 0))),
    lmm_stat = sprintf("%.2f", `F value`),
    lmm_p = format_p_value(`Pr(>F)`, include_operator = FALSE)
  )

ordinal_omnibus_table <- STAT.grid.ordinal |>
  mutate(
    effect = as.character(effect),
    ordinal_test = case_when(
      effect == "phenotype" ~ "Hierarchical omnibus test",
      effect == "intention" ~ "Hierarchical omnibus test",
      effect == "target_model" ~ "Hierarchical omnibus test",
      effect == "phenotype:intention:target_model" ~ "Direct 3-way LR test"
    ),
    ordinal_df = sprintf("X^2(%s)", as.integer(df)),
    ordinal_stat = sprintf("%.2f", chisq),
    ordinal_p = format_p_value(p_value, include_operator = FALSE)
  ) |>
  dplyr::select(effect, ordinal_test, ordinal_df, ordinal_stat, ordinal_p, comparison)

lmm_vs_ordinal_table <- lmm_omnibus_table |>
  left_join(ordinal_omnibus_table, by = "effect") |>
  mutate(
    effect = case_when(
      effect == "phenotype" ~ "Vulnerability",
      effect == "intention" ~ "Intent",
      effect == "target_model" ~ "Target model",
      effect == "phenotype:intention:target_model" ~ "Vulnerability x intent x target model",
      TRUE ~ effect
    )
  ) |>
  dplyr::select(
    Effect = effect,
    `LMM test` = lmm_test,
    `LMM df` = lmm_df,
    `LMM F` = lmm_stat,
    `LMM p` = lmm_p,
    `Ordinal test` = ordinal_test,
    `Ordinal LR χ²` = ordinal_stat,
    `Ordinal p` = ordinal_p,
    `Ordinal comparison` = comparison
  )

ordinal_n_tests <- nrow(STAT.grid.ordinal)
ordinal_n_significant <- sum(STAT.grid.ordinal$p_value < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE)
ordinal_three_way_test <- STAT.grid.ordinal |>
  dplyr::filter(effect == "phenotype:intention:target_model") |>
  dplyr::slice(1)
```

```{r}
#| label: conversation_level_stats_diagnostics
#| include: false
#| echo: false
#| cache: true
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| 
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

concerning_score_dist <- df_scores |>
  count(score__concerning, name = "n") |>
  tidyr::complete(score__concerning = 1:10, fill = list(n = 0)) |>
  mutate(
    frac = n / sum(n),
    score__concerning = factor(score__concerning, levels = 1:10)
  )

n_concerning_score_levels_used <- n_distinct(df_scores$score__concerning)
pct_concerning_scores_interior <- mean(df_scores$score__concerning %in% 2:9) * 100

p_concerning_score_hist <- ggplot(concerning_score_dist, aes(x = score__concerning, y = n)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#4C78A8", width = 0.85) +
  geom_text(aes(label = n), vjust = -0.3, size = base_font_size * 0.28) +
  labs(
    x = "Concerning score",
    y = "Number of conversations",
    title = "A",
    subtitle = "Observed score distribution"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.08))) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_font_size) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

lmm_diagnostic_df <- tibble(
  fitted = fitted(m),
  resid = resid(m)
)

qq_rmse <- function(residuals) {
  z <- as.numeric(scale(residuals))
  theoretical <- stats::qnorm(stats::ppoints(length(z)))
  observed <- sort(z)
  sqrt(mean((observed - theoretical)^2, na.rm = TRUE))
}

lmm_resid_binned <- lmm_diagnostic_df |>
  mutate(bin = dplyr::ntile(fitted, 10)) |>
  group_by(bin) |>
  summarise(
    fitted_mean = mean(fitted),
    resid_mean = mean(resid),
    resid_se = sd(resid) / sqrt(n()),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  mutate(
    lower = resid_mean - 1.96 * resid_se,
    upper = resid_mean + 1.96 * resid_se
  )

max_abs_binned_mean_resid <- max(abs(lmm_resid_binned$resid_mean), na.rm = TRUE)
observed_qq_rmse <- qq_rmse(lmm_diagnostic_df$resid)

ordinal_score_probabilities <- function(model, data) {
  design <- stats::model.matrix(
    ~ phenotype * intention * target_model,
    data = data
  )
  design <- design[, names(model$beta), drop = FALSE]
  eta <- as.vector(design %*% model$beta)
  alpha <- as.numeric(model$alpha)
  cumulative <- sapply(alpha, function(a) stats::plogis(a - eta))
  probabilities <- cbind(
    cumulative[, 1],
    cumulative[, -1, drop = FALSE] - cumulative[, -ncol(cumulative), drop = FALSE],
    1 - cumulative[, ncol(cumulative)]
  )
  probabilities[probabilities < 0] <- 0
  probabilities / rowSums(probabilities)
}

ordinal_simulation_n <- 100
ordinal_predicted_probabilities <- ordinal_score_probabilities(m_full, df_ord)
ordinal_score_levels <- as.numeric(levels(df_ord$concerning))

set.seed(20260204)
ordinal_benchmark_qq_rmse <- replicate(
  ordinal_simulation_n,
  {
    simulated_scores <- apply(
      ordinal_predicted_probabilities,
      1,
      function(probabilities) sample(ordinal_score_levels, 1, prob = probabilities)
    )
    simulated_df_scores <- df_scores
    simulated_df_scores$score__concerning <- simulated_scores
    simulated_lmm <- suppressWarnings(suppressMessages(lme4::lmer(
      score__concerning ~ phenotype * intention * target_model +
        (1 | target_model:label_id),
      data = simulated_df_scores,
      REML = FALSE
    )))
    qq_rmse(stats::resid(simulated_lmm))
  }
)

ordinal_benchmark_qq_lower <- unname(stats::quantile(
  ordinal_benchmark_qq_rmse,
  0.025,
  na.rm = TRUE
))
ordinal_benchmark_qq_upper <- unname(stats::quantile(
  ordinal_benchmark_qq_rmse,
  0.975,
  na.rm = TRUE
))
ordinal_benchmark_pct_equal_or_larger <- mean(
  ordinal_benchmark_qq_rmse >= observed_qq_rmse,
  na.rm = TRUE
) * 100
observed_qq_within_ordinal_interval <- observed_qq_rmse >= ordinal_benchmark_qq_lower &&
  observed_qq_rmse <= ordinal_benchmark_qq_upper
observed_qq_ordinal_interval_statement <- ifelse(
  observed_qq_within_ordinal_interval,
  "within",
  "outside"
)

lmm_resid_ylim <- range(c(lmm_resid_binned$lower, lmm_resid_binned$upper, 0), na.rm = TRUE)

p_lmm_resid_fitted <- ggplot(lmm_resid_binned, aes(x = fitted_mean, y = resid_mean)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40", linewidth = 0.3) +
  geom_point(size = 1.3, color = "black") +
  labs(
    x = "Fitted value",
    y = "Mean residual",
    title = "B",
    subtitle = "Binned residuals vs fitted"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_font_size) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = lmm_resid_ylim,
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0.05, 0.05))
  )

p_lmm_resid_qq <- ggplot(lmm_diagnostic_df, aes(sample = resid)) +
  stat_qq(size = 0.7, alpha = 0.35) +
  stat_qq_line(linewidth = 0.3, color = "gray40") +
  labs(
    x = "Theoretical quantiles",
    y = "Sample quantiles",
    title = "C",
    subtitle = "Residual Q-Q plot"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_font_size) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )
```

```{r}
#| label: overall_risk

target_levels <- df_scores %>%
  distinct(target_model) %>%
  arrange(target_model) %>%
  pull(target_model)

df_scores <- df_scores %>%
  mutate(target_model = factor(target_model, levels = target_levels))

overall_pc1 <- df_scores %>%
  transmute(target_model, score = pca_score__PC1) %>%
  filter(!is.na(score)) %>%
  group_by(target_model) %>%
  summarise_with_ci() %>%
  rename(mean_score = mean)

gg_overall_pc1 <- ggplot(overall_pc1, aes(x = target_model, y = mean_score, fill = target_model)) +
  geom_col(width = 1) +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper),
                 linewidth = 0.25, color = "grey35", width = 0.18) +

  labs(x = NULL, y = "PC1 ± 95% CI", subtitle = "C") +

                     expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05))) +

mechanism_labels <- c(
  "score__concerning"                                = "Concerning",
  "score__mh_therapeutic_quality"                    = "Therapeutic quality",
  "score__self_harm_or_suicide_enablement"           = "Self-harm enablement",
  "score__unprompted_sycophancy"                     = "Sycophancy",
  "score__mh_maladaptive_belief_reinforcement"       = "Belief reinforcement",
  "score__mh_risky_action_enablement"                = "Risky action enablement",
  "score__mh_avoidance_and_reassurance_loops"        = "Avoidance / reassurance loops",
  "score__mh_boundary_and_dependence_risk"           = "Boundary / dependence risk",

  "score__mh_harm_to_others"                         = "Harm to others",
  "score__mh_stigma_and_invalidation"                = "Stigma / invalidation"
)

mech_cols <- intersect(names(mechanism_labels), names(df_scores))

n_panels <- length(mech_cols)
ncol_facets <- ceiling(sqrt(n_panels))

mech_long <- df_scores %>%
  select(target_model, all_of(mech_cols)) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = all_of(mech_cols), names_to = "mechanism", values_to = "score") %>%
  filter(!is.na(score)) %>%
  mutate(
    mechanism = factor(
      mechanism,
      levels = mech_cols,
      labels = unname(mechanism_labels[mech_cols])

mech_summary <- mech_long %>%

gg_mech_overall <- ggplot(mech_summary, aes(x = target_model, y = mean_score, fill = target_model)) +

                     expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05))) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_font_size) +
  theme(legend.position = "none", panel.grid.minor = element_blank()) +
  coord_flip()
```
