```{r}
#| label: expression of risk
#| include: false
#| echo: false

source("Functions/helper_functions.R")
summarise_with_ci <- function(.data) {
  .data %>%
    summarise(
      n     = sum(!is.na(score)),
      mean  = mean_ci_95(score)$mean,
      error = mean_ci_95(score)$error,
      lower = mean_ci_95(score)$lower,
      upper = mean_ci_95(score)$upper,
      .groups = "drop"
    )
}

mh_cols <- names(df_scores)[grepl("^score__mh_", names(df_scores))]

# additional “global” dimensions that are still interpretable as risk mechanisms
extra_cols <- c(
  "score__concerning",
  "score__self_harm_or_suicide_enablement",
  "score__unprompted_sycophancy"
)

# keep only those present in df_scores
extra_cols <- intersect(extra_cols, names(df_scores))

# final set of score columns
score_cols_use <- unique(c(mh_cols, extra_cols))

mechanism_labels <- c(
  "score__concerning"                              = "Concerning",
  "score__mh_therapeutic_quality"                  = "Therapeutic quality",
  "score__self_harm_or_suicide_enablement"         = "Self-harm enablement",
  "score__unprompted_sycophancy"                   = "Sycophancy",
  "score__mh_maladaptive_belief_reinforcement"     = "Belief reinforcement",
  "score__mh_risky_action_enablement"              = "Risky action enablement",
  "score__mh_avoidance_and_reassurance_loops"      = "Avoidance / reassurance loops",
  "score__mh_boundary_and_dependence_risk"         = "Boundary / dependence risk",
  "score__mh_minimization_of_risk_or_symptoms"     = "Minimization of risk/symptoms",
  "score__mh_glorification_or_romanticization"     = "Glorification / romanticization",
  "score__mh_medical_advice"                       = "Medical advice risk",
  "score__mh_harm_to_others"                       = "Harm to others",
  "score__mh_stigma_and_invalidation"              = "Stigma / invalidation"
)

nice_mech <- function(x) {
  ifelse(
    x %in% names(mechanism_labels),
    unname(mechanism_labels[x]),
    x %>%
      sub("^score__", "", .) %>%
      str_replace_all("_", " ") %>%
      str_to_sentence()
  )
}


df_mech_long <- df_scores %>%
  select(transcript_id, target_model, phenotype, intention, all_of(score_cols_use)) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols      = all_of(score_cols_use),
    names_to  = "mechanism",
    values_to = "score"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(score)) %>%
  mutate(
    # IMPORTANT: avoid recode() masking (car::recode vs dplyr::recode)
    intention = dplyr::recode(intention, !!!intention_labels),
    mechanism = nice_mech(mechanism)
  )


library(dplyr)
library(forcats)
library(ggplot2)

# 1) PRIORITY mechs must exactly match df_mech_long$mechanism strings
priority_mechs <- c(
  "Concerning",
  "Therapeutic quality"
)

# Optional sanity check: see which priorities don't match
setdiff(priority_mechs, unique(df_mech_long$mechanism))

# 2) Compute the rest in the order you want (here: descending mean score)
rest_mechs <- df_mech_long %>%
  filter(!mechanism %in% priority_mechs) %>%
  group_by(mechanism) %>%
  summarise(m = mean(score, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(desc(m)) %>%
  pull(mechanism)

mech_order <- c(priority_mechs, rest_mechs)

# 3) Apply ordering BEFORE you summarise / plot
df_mech_long <- df_mech_long %>%
  mutate(
    mechanism = factor(mechanism, levels = mech_order),
    phenotype = factor(phenotype, levels = phenotype_levels),
    intention = factor(intention, levels = intention_levels)
  )

by_mech_grid <- df_mech_long %>%
  group_by(phenotype, intention, mechanism) %>%
  summarise_with_ci() %>%
  rename(mean_score = mean)

gg_mechanisms_heatmap <- ggplot(
  by_mech_grid,
  aes(x = intention, y = phenotype, fill = mean_score)
) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.25) +
  geom_text(
    aes(
      label = sprintf("%.1f", mean_score),
      color = ifelse(mean_score <= 6, "white", "grey15")
    ),
    size = base_font_size * 0.22
  ) +
  scale_color_identity() +
  facet_wrap(~ mechanism, ncol = 3, drop = FALSE) +   # drop=FALSE keeps empty facets if any
  scale_fill_viridis_c(
    option = "C",
    limits = c(0, 10),
    breaks = c(0, 5, 10),
    name = "Mean score"
  ) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, subtitle = "Risk expression varies by vulnerability and intent") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_font_size) +
  theme(
    legend.position   = "right",
    panel.grid        = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x       = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1),
    strip.text        = element_text(size = base_font_size * 0.95),
    plot.margin       = margin(2, 2, 2, 2)
  )

gg_mechanisms_heatmap



##
## STATS
##

df_mech_long <- df_scores %>%
  select(transcript_id, target_model, label_id, phenotype, intention, all_of(score_cols_use)) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols      = all_of(score_cols_use),
    names_to  = "mechanism_key",
    values_to = "score"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(score)) %>%
  mutate(
    intention = dplyr::recode(intention, !!!intention_labels),
    mechanism = nice_mech(mechanism_key)
  )

priority_mechs <- c(
  "Concerning",
  "Therapeutic quality"
)

rest_mechs <- df_mech_long %>%
  group_by(mechanism) %>%
  summarise(m = mean(score, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(desc(m)) %>%
  pull(mechanism) %>%
  setdiff(priority_mechs)

mech_order <- c(priority_mechs, rest_mechs)

CONTROL_TARGET_MODEL <- TRUE


fit_one_mech <- function(dat) {

  f_fixed <- if (CONTROL_TARGET_MODEL) {
    score ~ phenotype * intention + target_model
  } else {
    score ~ phenotype * intention
  }

  m <- lmer(
    update(f_fixed, . ~ . + (1 | target_model:label_id)),
    data = dat,
    REML = FALSE
  )

  a <- anova(m, type = 3, ddf = "Satterthwaite")
  a <- as.data.frame(a)

  # robust column extraction across lmerTest versions
  get_col <- function(df, candidates) {
    nm <- intersect(candidates, colnames(df))
    if (length(nm) == 0) stop("Could not find expected columns in anova table: ", paste(colnames(df), collapse=", "))
    df[[nm[1]]]
  }

  terms_keep <- c("phenotype", "intention", "phenotype:intention")

  tibble(
    term    = rownames(a),
    Df1     = get_col(a, c("NumDF", "numDF", "Num Df", "Df")),
    Df2     = get_col(a, c("DenDF", "denDF", "Den Df")),
    F_value = get_col(a, c("F.value", "F value", "F-value", "F")),
    p       = get_col(a, c("Pr(>F)", "Pr(>F )", "p.value", "p"))
  ) %>%
    filter(term %in% terms_keep)
}

# IMPORTANT: include label_id so the random effect can be fit
df_mech_long <- df_scores %>%
  select(transcript_id, label_id, target_model, phenotype, intention, all_of(score_cols_use)) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols      = all_of(score_cols_use),
    names_to  = "mechanism_key",
    values_to = "score"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(score)) %>%
  mutate(
    intention = dplyr::recode(intention, !!!intention_labels),
    mechanism = nice_mech(mechanism_key)
  )

STAT.mechanisms <- df_mech_long %>%
  dplyr::group_by(mechanism, mechanism_key) %>%
  group_modify(~ fit_one_mech(.x)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  group_by(term) %>%
  mutate(p_fdr = p.adjust(p, method = "BH")) %>%
  ungroup()
```

```{r}
#| label: concerning_v1_vs_control
#| include: false
#| echo: false
#| out.width: "100%"

SCORE_MIN <- 0
SCORE_MAX <- 10

df_v1 <- df_scores %>%
  mutate(
    target_model = sub("^([^/]+/){2}", "", target_model),
    score__concerning = pmin(pmax(score__concerning, SCORE_MIN), SCORE_MAX)
  )

sum_v1 <- df_v1 %>%
  filter(!is.na(score__concerning)) %>%
  transmute(target_model, score = score__concerning) %>%
  group_by(target_model) %>%
  summarise_with_ci() %>%
  mutate(
    lower = pmax(lower, SCORE_MIN),
    upper = pmin(upper, SCORE_MAX)
  ) %>%
  rename(
    mean_v1  = mean,
    lower_v1 = lower,
    upper_v1 = upper
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

df_control <- read.csv("../out/v1_control/results/summary_models_with_pca.csv")
df_control$target_model = gsub('anthorpic/claude-sonnet-3.7', 'anthorpic/claude-3.7-sonnet', df_control$target_model)

df_control <- df_control %>%
  mutate(
    target_model = sub("^([^/]+/){2}", "", target_model),
    score__concerning = pmin(pmax(score__concerning, SCORE_MIN), SCORE_MAX)
  )

sum_control <- df_control %>%
  filter(!is.na(score__concerning)) %>%
  transmute(target_model, score = score__concerning) %>%
  group_by(target_model) %>%
  summarise_with_ci() %>%
  mutate(
    lower = pmax(lower, SCORE_MIN),
    upper = pmin(upper, SCORE_MAX)
  ) %>%
  rename(
    mean_control  = mean,
    lower_control = lower,
    upper_control = upper
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

plot_df <- sum_v1 %>%
  inner_join(sum_control, by = "target_model") %>%
  mutate(
    target_model = factor(target_model, levels = sum_v1$target_model)
  )

gg_concerning_v1_vs_control <- ggplot(
  plot_df,
  aes(x = mean_v1, y = mean_control, color = target_model)
) +

  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.4, color = "grey40") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.4, color = "grey40") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.4, color = "grey40") +
  geom_errorbarh(
    aes(xmin = lower_v1, xmax = upper_v1),
    height = 0, linewidth = 0.5, alpha = 0.85
  ) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = lower_control, ymax = upper_control),
    width = 0, linewidth = 0.5, alpha = 0.85
  ) +
  geom_point(aes(fill = target_model), shape = 21, color = "black", stroke = group_dot_stroke, size = group_dot_size, show.legend = FALSE) +
  xlim(SCORE_MIN, SCORE_MAX) + 
  ylim(SCORE_MIN, SCORE_MAX) +
  labs(
    x = "Vulnerable users: mean concerning behavior scores (± 95% CI)",
    y = "Non-vulnerable users: mean concerning behavior scores (± 95% CI)",
    subtitle = "Lower scores for concerning chatbot behavior in simulated users with/without a mental-health vulnerability",
    color = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_font_size) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    legend.position      = "top",
    legend.direction     = "horizontal",
    legend.justification = "right",
    legend.box.margin    = margin(b = 2),
    legend.spacing.x     = unit(6, "pt"),
    legend.spacing.y     = unit(0, "pt"),
    legend.key.height    = unit(6, "pt"),
    legend.background    = element_blank(),
    legend.key           = element_blank()
  ) +
  guides(
    color = guide_legend(
      nrow = 2,
      byrow = TRUE,
      override.aes = list(alpha = 1, size = 1, linewidth = 0)
    )
  )

gg_concerning_v1_vs_control



v1_scores <- df_v1 %>%
  filter(!is.na(score__concerning)) %>%
  transmute(
    condition = "v1",
    target_model,
    score = score__concerning
  )

control_scores <- df_control %>%
  filter(!is.na(score__concerning)) %>%
  transmute(
    condition = "control",
    target_model,
    score = score__concerning
  )

tt_df <- dplyr::bind_rows(v1_scores, control_scores)

STAT.concerning_v1_vs_control <- t.test(score ~ condition, data = tt_df) 
```

```{r}
#| label: concerning_sonnet45_v1_vs_gpt5_audit
#| include: false
#| echo: false
#| out.width: "100%"

SCORE_MIN <- 0
SCORE_MAX <- 10

TARGET_MODEL_V1   <- "claude-4.5-sonnet"
TARGET_MODEL_GPT5 <- "claude-4.5-sonnet"

df_v1_sonnet45 <- df_scores %>%
  mutate(
    target_model = sub("^([^/]+/){2}", "", target_model),
    score__concerning = pmin(pmax(score__concerning, SCORE_MIN), SCORE_MAX)
  ) %>%
  filter(target_model == TARGET_MODEL_V1)

df_gpt5_sonnet45 <- read.csv("../out/v1_gpt5/results/summary_models_with_pca.csv") %>%
  mutate(
    score__concerning = pmin(pmax(score__concerning, SCORE_MIN), SCORE_MAX)
  ) %>%
  filter(target_model == TARGET_MODEL_GPT5)

sum_v1 <- df_v1_sonnet45 %>%
  filter(!is.na(score__concerning)) %>%
  transmute(score = score__concerning) %>%
  summarise_with_ci() %>%
  mutate(
    audit = "Original audit",
    lower = pmax(lower, SCORE_MIN),
    upper = pmin(upper, SCORE_MAX)
  )

sum_gpt5 <- df_gpt5_sonnet45 %>%
  filter(!is.na(score__concerning)) %>%
  transmute(score = score__concerning) %>%
  summarise_with_ci() %>%
  mutate(
    audit = "GPT-5 audit",
    lower = pmax(lower, SCORE_MIN),
    upper = pmin(upper, SCORE_MAX)
  )

plot_df_audit_comparison <- bind_rows(sum_v1, sum_gpt5) %>%
  mutate(audit = factor(audit, levels = c("Original audit", "GPT-5 audit")))

gg_concerning_sonnet45_v1_vs_gpt5_audit <- ggplot(plot_df_audit_comparison, aes(x = audit, y = mean)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.65, alpha = 0.85, fill = "grey60") +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), linewidth = 0.7, color = "grey25") +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(SCORE_MIN, SCORE_MAX)) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Concerning (mean ± 95% CI)",
    title = "Sonnet-4.5: Concerning scores differ across audit pipelines.",
    subtitle = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_font_size) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5)
  )

gg_concerning_sonnet45_v1_vs_gpt5_audit

tt_df <- bind_rows(
  df_v1_sonnet45 %>% transmute(audit = "Original audit", score = score__concerning),
  df_gpt5_sonnet45 %>% transmute(audit = "GPT-5 audit", score = score__concerning)
) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(score))

STAT.concerning_sonnet45_v1_vs_gpt5_audit <- t.test(score ~ audit, data = tt_df)
```

```{r}
#| label: concerning_conv_vs_turn
#| include: false
#| echo: false
#| out.width: "100%"

conv_turn <- read_csv("../out/v1/results/conv_with_turn_mean.csv")
conv_turn <- conv_turn %>%
  mutate(
    target_model = sub("^([^/]+/){2}", "", target_model)
  )

# Keep only rows with both conv-level and turn-mean "Concerning"
concerning_df <- conv_turn %>%
  dplyr::select(score__concerning, turn_mean__concerning, target_model) %>%
  tidyr::drop_na()

summary_df <- concerning_df %>%
  dplyr::group_by(target_model) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n = dplyr::n(),
    mean_conv = mean(score__concerning),
    mean_turn = mean(turn_mean__concerning),
    se_conv   = sd(score__concerning) / sqrt(n),
    se_turn   = sd(turn_mean__concerning) / sqrt(n),
    ci_conv_l = mean_conv - 1.96 * se_conv,
    ci_conv_u = mean_conv + 1.96 * se_conv,
    ci_turn_l = mean_turn - 1.96 * se_turn,
    ci_turn_u = mean_turn + 1.96 * se_turn,
    .groups = "drop"
  )

lims <- range(c(concerning_df$score__concerning, concerning_df$turn_mean__concerning), na.rm = TRUE)

turn_to_conv_corr <- ggplot(
  concerning_df,
  aes(x = score__concerning, y = turn_mean__concerning, color = target_model)
) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.10, size = 1) +
  geom_abline(intercept = 0, slope = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40") +

  geom_linerange(
    data = summary_df,
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    aes(
      x = mean_conv,
      ymin = ci_turn_l,
      ymax = ci_turn_u,
      color = target_model
    ),
    linewidth = 0.5
  ) +
  geom_linerange(
    data = summary_df,
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    aes(
      y = mean_turn,
      xmin = ci_conv_l,
      xmax = ci_conv_u,
      color = target_model
    ),
    linewidth = 0.5
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = summary_df,
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    aes(x = mean_conv, y = mean_turn, fill = target_model),
    shape = 21, color = "black", stroke = group_dot_stroke, size = group_dot_size,
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +

  xlim(0, 10) + ylim(0, 10) +
  labs(
    x = "Concerning (conversation-level score)",
    y = "Concerning (turn-level score)",
    subtitle = "Average turn-level scores align with conversation-level scores",
    color = NULL
  ) +

  theme_minimal(base_size = base_font_size) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    legend.position      = "top",
    legend.direction     = "horizontal",
    legend.justification = "right",

    legend.box.margin = margin(b = 2),
    legend.spacing.x  = unit(6, "pt"),
    legend.spacing.y  = unit(0, "pt"),
    legend.key.height = unit(6, "pt"),

    legend.background = element_blank(),
    legend.key = element_blank()
  ) +
  guides(
    color = guide_legend(
      nrow = 4,
      byrow = TRUE,
      override.aes = list(
        alpha = 1,
        size = 1,
        linewidth = 0
      )
    )
  )

turn_to_conv_corr

# Correlation
STAT.r_concerning <- cor.test(
  concerning_df$score__concerning,
  concerning_df$turn_mean__concerning,
  method = "spearman",
  exact = FALSE
)

# t-test: turn-level mean vs conversation-level difference
concerning_df <- concerning_df %>%
  mutate(delta = turn_mean__concerning - score__concerning)

delta_mean <- mean(concerning_df$delta)
delta_se   <- sd(concerning_df$delta) / sqrt(nrow(concerning_df))
delta_ci_l <- delta_mean - 1.96 * delta_se
delta_ci_u <- delta_mean + 1.96 * delta_se

STAT.est_concerning <- t.test(concerning_df$delta, mu = 0)
```

```{r}
#| label: pc1_conv_vs_conv
#| include: false
#| echo: false
#| out.width: "100%"

library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(stringr)
library(grid)       
library(stats)

common_path <- "../out/v1/conversation_scores/alignment_opus_gpt-5.2.csv"  # or "...csv"
common <- read_csv(common_path, show_col_types = FALSE)

pc1_df <- common %>%
  mutate(
    target_model = coalesce(target_model_opus, target_model_gpt5),
    target_model = sub("^([^/]+/){2}", "", target_model)  # keep model short like you did
  ) %>%
  select(
    transcript_id,
    target_model,
    pc1_opus = pca_score__PC1_opus,
    pc1_gpt5 = pca_score__PC1_gpt5
  ) %>%
  drop_na()

summary_df <- pc1_df %>%
  group_by(target_model) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean_opus = mean(pc1_opus),
    mean_gpt5 = mean(pc1_gpt5),
    se_opus   = sd(pc1_opus) / sqrt(n),
    se_gpt5   = sd(pc1_gpt5) / sqrt(n),
    ci_opus_l = mean_opus - 1.96 * se_opus,
    ci_opus_u = mean_opus + 1.96 * se_opus,
    ci_gpt5_l = mean_gpt5 - 1.96 * se_gpt5,
    ci_gpt5_u = mean_gpt5 + 1.96 * se_gpt5,
    .groups = "drop"
  )

lims <- range(c(pc1_df$pc1_opus, pc1_df$pc1_gpt5), na.rm = TRUE)

judge_agreement_pc1 <- ggplot(
  pc1_df,
  aes(x = pc1_opus, y = pc1_gpt5, color = target_model)
) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.10, size = 1) +
  geom_abline(intercept = 0, slope = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40") +
  geom_linerange(
    data = summary_df,
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    aes(
      x = mean_opus,
      ymin = ci_gpt5_l,
      ymax = ci_gpt5_u,
      color = target_model
    ),
    linewidth = 0.5
  ) +
  geom_linerange(
    data = summary_df,
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    aes(
      y = mean_gpt5,
      xmin = ci_opus_l,
      xmax = ci_opus_u,
      color = target_model
    ),
    linewidth = 0.5
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = summary_df,
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    aes(x = mean_opus, y = mean_gpt5, fill = target_model),
    shape = 21, color = "black", stroke = group_dot_stroke, size = group_dot_size,
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(
    xlim = lims + c(-0.5, 0.5),
    ylim = lims + c(-0.5, 0.5)
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "PC1 (claude-opus-4.5 judge; conversation-level)",
    y = "PC1 (gpt-5.2 judge; conversation-level)",
    title = "A",
    subtitle = "Agreement between automated safety judges",
    color = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_font_size) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    legend.position      = "top",
    legend.direction     = "horizontal",
    legend.justification = "right",
    legend.box.margin = margin(b = 2),
    legend.spacing.x  = unit(6, "pt"),
    legend.spacing.y  = unit(0, "pt"),
    legend.key.height = unit(6, "pt"),
    legend.background = element_blank(),
    legend.key = element_blank()
  ) +
  guides(
    color = guide_legend(
      nrow = 4,
      byrow = TRUE,
      override.aes = list(alpha = 1, size = 1, linewidth = 0)
    )
  )
judge_agreement_pc1

STAT.conv_r_pc1 <- cor.test(pc1_df$pc1_opus, pc1_df$pc1_gpt5, method = "spearman", exact = FALSE)


mechanism_labels_2 <- c(
  "score__concerning"                              = "Concerning",
  "score__mh_therapeutic_quality"                  = "Therapeutic quality",
  "score__self_harm_or_suicide_enablement"         = "Self-harm",
  "score__unprompted_sycophancy"                   = "Sycophancy",
  "score__mh_maladaptive_belief_reinforcement"     = "Belief reinforcement",
  "score__mh_risky_action_enablement"              = "Risky action",
  "score__mh_avoidance_and_reassurance_loops"      = "Avoid/Reassure",
  "score__mh_boundary_and_dependence_risk"         = "Boundary/Depend.",
  "score__mh_minimization_of_risk_or_symptoms"     = "Minimization",
  "score__mh_glorification_or_romanticization"     = "Glorification",
  "score__mh_medical_advice"                       = "Medical advice",
  "score__mh_harm_to_others"                       = "Harm to others",
  "score__mh_stigma_and_invalidation"              = "Stigma/Invalidation"
)

mh_keys <- names(mechanism_labels_2)

mh_long <- common %>%
  mutate(
    target_model = coalesce(target_model_opus, target_model_gpt5),
    target_model = sub("^([^/]+/){2}", "", target_model)
  ) %>%
  select(
    transcript_id,
    target_model,
    matches(paste0("^(", paste0(mh_keys, collapse="|"), ")_opus$")),
    matches(paste0("^(", paste0(mh_keys, collapse="|"), ")_gpt5$"))
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -c(transcript_id, target_model),
    names_to = "col",
    values_to = "value"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    judge = case_when(
      str_ends(col, "_opus") ~ "opus",
      str_ends(col, "_gpt5") ~ "gpt5",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    dim_key = str_replace(col, "(_opus|_gpt5)$", "")
  ) %>%
  select(-col) %>%
  drop_na(judge) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = judge,
    values_from = value
  ) %>%
  drop_na(opus, gpt5) %>%
  mutate(
    dim_label = unname(mechanism_labels_2[dim_key]),
    dim_label = factor(dim_label, levels = unname(mechanism_labels_2))
  )

summary_long <- mh_long %>%
  group_by(target_model, dim_label) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean_opus = mean(opus),
    mean_gpt5 = mean(gpt5),
    se_opus   = sd(opus) / sqrt(n),
    se_gpt5   = sd(gpt5) / sqrt(n),
    ci_opus_l = mean_opus - 1.96 * se_opus,
    ci_opus_u = mean_opus + 1.96 * se_opus,
    ci_gpt5_l = mean_gpt5 - 1.96 * se_gpt5,
    ci_gpt5_u = mean_gpt5 + 1.96 * se_gpt5,
    .groups = "drop"
  )

stat_mh_corr <- mh_long %>%
  group_by(dim_label) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    r = cor(opus, gpt5, method = "spearman"),
    p = cor.test(opus, gpt5, method = "spearman", exact = FALSE)$p.value,
    .groups = "drop"
  )

lims <- range(c(mh_long$opus, mh_long$gpt5), na.rm = TRUE)

judge_agreement_mh <- ggplot(
  mh_long,
  aes(x = opus, y = gpt5, color = target_model)
) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.05, size = 0.4) +
  geom_abline(intercept = 0, slope = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40") +
  # geom_linerange(
  #   data = summary_long,
  #   inherit.aes = FALSE,
  #   aes(
  #     x = mean_opus,
  #     ymin = ci_gpt5_l,
  #     ymax = ci_gpt5_u,
  #     color = target_model
  #   ),
  #   linewidth = 0.4
  # ) +
  # geom_linerange(
  #   data = summary_long,
  #   inherit.aes = FALSE,
  #   aes(
  #     y = mean_gpt5,
  #     xmin = ci_opus_l,
  #     xmax = ci_opus_u,
  #     color = target_model
  #   ),
  #   linewidth = 0.4
  # ) +
  geom_point(
    data = summary_long,
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    aes(x = mean_opus, y = mean_gpt5, fill = target_model),
    shape = 21, color = "black", stroke = group_dot_stroke, size = group_dot_size,
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +

  coord_cartesian(
    xlim = lims + c(-0.5, 0.5),
    ylim = lims + c(-0.5, 0.5)
  ) +

  facet_wrap(~ dim_label, ncol = 3) +

  labs(
    x = "claude-opus-4.5 judge (conversation-level)",
    y = "gpt-5.2 judge (conversation-level)",
    title = "B",
    subtitle = "Risk-dimension scores agree across independent automated safety judges",
    color = NULL
  ) +

  theme_minimal(base_size = base_font_size) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    legend.position      = "none",
    legend.direction     = "horizontal",
    legend.justification = "right",
    legend.box.margin = margin(b = 2),
    legend.spacing.x  = unit(6, "pt"),
    legend.spacing.y  = unit(0, "pt"),
    legend.key.height = unit(6, "pt"),
    legend.background = element_blank(),
    legend.key = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(size = base_font_size - 1)
  ) +
  guides(
    color = guide_legend(
      nrow = 4,
      byrow = TRUE,
      override.aes = list(alpha = 1, size = 1, linewidth = 0)
    )
  )

judge_agreement_mh

## MH all
STAT.conv_r_all_mh <- cor.test(summary_long$mean_gpt5, summary_long$mean_opus, method = "spearman", exact = FALSE)

```

```{r}
#| label: causal_recovery
#| include: false
#| echo: false
#| out.width: "100%"

library(tidyverse)
library(viridis)
library(grid)

path_auc <- "../out/v1/val/auc_matrix_grok-4.csv"

mechanism_labels <- c(
  "concerning"                                = "Concerning",
  "mh_therapeutic_quality"                    = "Therapeutic quality",
  "self_harm_or_suicide_enablement"           = "Self-harm enablement",
  "unprompted_sycophancy"                     = "Sycophancy",
  "mh_maladaptive_belief_reinforcement"       = "Belief reinforcement",
  "mh_risky_action_enablement"                = "Risky action enablement",
  "mh_avoidance_and_reassurance_loops"        = "Avoidance / reassurance loops",
  "mh_boundary_and_dependence_risk"           = "Boundary / dependence risk",
  "mh_minimization_of_risk_or_symptoms"       = "Minimization of risk/symptoms",
  "mh_glorification_or_romanticization"       = "Glorification / romanticization",
  "mh_medical_advice"                         = "Medical advice risk",
  "mh_harm_to_others"                         = "Harm to others",
  "mh_stigma_and_invalidation"                = "Stigma / invalidation"
)

rename_mech <- function(x) {
  x <- as.character(x)
  out <- unname(mechanism_labels[x])
  ifelse(is.na(out), x, out)
}

m_auc <- read.csv(path_auc, row.names = 1, check.names = FALSE) %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column("manipulated")

m_auc <- m_auc %>%
  mutate(manipulated = rename_mech(manipulated))

new_names <- names(m_auc)
new_names[new_names != "manipulated"] <- rename_mech(new_names[new_names != "manipulated"])
names(m_auc) <- new_names

mech_order <- unname(mechanism_labels)  

m_auc <- m_auc %>%
  select(manipulated, any_of(mech_order)) %>%
  mutate(manipulated = factor(manipulated, levels = mech_order)) %>%
  arrange(manipulated)

auc_long <- m_auc %>%
  pivot_longer(-manipulated, names_to = "expressed", values_to = "auc") %>%
  mutate(
    manipulated = factor(manipulated, levels = mech_order),
    expressed   = factor(expressed,   levels = mech_order),
    auc         = as.numeric(auc)
  )

plot_causal_auc <- ggplot(
  auc_long[!is.na(auc_long$manipulated),],
  aes(x = expressed, y = manipulated, fill = auc)
) +
  geom_tile() +
  geom_text(
    aes(
      label = sprintf("%.2f", auc),
      color = ifelse(auc <= 0.6, "white", "black")
    ),
    size = base_font_size * 0.33,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(limits = c(0, 1), na.value = "white") +
  scale_color_identity() +
  labs(
    x = "Expressed risk dimension",
    y = "Manipulated risk dimension",
    fill = "AUC",
    title = "A",
    subtitle = "Automated safety judge recovers causal manipulations of risk"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_font_size) +
  theme(
    legend.position   = "right",
    legend.key.width  = unit(0.3, "lines"),
    legend.spacing.x  = unit(0.8, "lines"),
    legend.text       = element_text(size = base_font_size * 0.8),
    axis.text.x       = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    panel.grid.major  = element_line(color = "grey90", linewidth = 0.4),
    panel.grid.minor  = element_line(color = "grey95", linewidth = 0.2)
  )

targeted_df = read.csv("../out/v1/val/targeted_auc_dprime_grok-4.csv")
```

```{r}
#| label: ICC
#| include: false
#| echo: false
#| out.width: "100%"
library(psych)

df_rep <- df %>%
  group_by(target_model, label_id) %>%
  arrange(transcript_id, .by_group = TRUE) %>%   # or arrange(file)
  mutate(rep = row_number()) %>%
  ungroup()

stopifnot(all(df_rep$rep %in% 1:3))

score_col <- "pca_score__PC1"   # change to any score__... column you want

wide <- df_rep %>%
  select(target_model, label_id, rep, score = all_of(score_col)) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from  = rep,
    values_from = score,
    names_prefix = "rep"
  )

X <- wide %>% select(rep1, rep2, rep3) %>% as.matrix()

icc_all <- psych::ICC(X)


score_col <- "score__concerning"  

wide_concerning <- df_rep %>%
  select(target_model, label_id, rep, score = all_of(score_col)) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from  = rep,
    values_from = score,
    names_prefix = "rep"
  )

X_concerning <- wide_concerning %>% select(rep1, rep2, rep3) %>% as.matrix()

icc_all_concerning <- psych::ICC(X_concerning)
```

```{r}
#| label: expert_ratings
#| include: false
#| echo: false
#| out.width: "100%"

wide_expert<- read.csv("../out/v1/results/expert_ratings/wide_expert.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

X_expert <- wide_expert %>% dplyr::select(rep3, expert_rating_VW) %>% as.matrix()
icc_expert_concerning <- psych::ICC(X_expert)

icc_expert_concerning
```

```{r}
#| label: concerning_turn_trajectories
#| include: false
#| echo: false
#| out.width: "100%"

source("Functions/helper_functions.R")

# Concerning scores are bounded to [1, 10]
SCORE_MIN <- 1
SCORE_MAX <- 10

summarise_with_ci <- function(.data) {
  tmp <- .data %>%
    summarise(
      n     = sum(!is.na(score)),
      mean  = mean_ci_95(score)$mean,
      error = mean_ci_95(score)$error,
      lower = mean_ci_95(score)$lower,
      upper = mean_ci_95(score)$upper,
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  # Clip CI to the valid score range so ribbons never extend beyond [1, 10]
  tmp %>%
    mutate(
      lower = pmax(lower, SCORE_MIN),
      upper = pmin(upper, SCORE_MAX)
    )
}

intention_labels <- c(
  "Belief validation"                  = "Belief validation",
  "Dependence and anthropomorphism"    = "Dependence",
  "Glorification / romanticization"    = "Glorification",
  "Reassurance and avoidance"          = "Avoidance",
  "Risky action permission / planning" = "Risky action",
  "Trivialization / minimization"      = "Minimization"
)
intention_levels <- unname(intention_labels)

phenotype_labels <- c(
  "DEPRESSION"           = "Depression",
  "PSYCHOSIS"            = "Psychosis",
  "OCD"                  = "OCD",
  "MANIA_HYPOMANIA"      = "Mania",
  "INSECURE_ATTACHMENT"  = "IA"
)

conv_turn <- read_csv(
  "../out/v1/results/conv_turns_full.csv",
  show_col_types = FALSE
) %>%
  mutate(
    target_model = sub("^([^/]+/){2}", "", target_model),

    # Ensure the score itself is within [1,10] (defensive; should already hold)
    concerning  = pmin(pmax(concerning, SCORE_MIN), SCORE_MAX),

    phenotype = dplyr::recode(phenotype, !!!phenotype_labels),
    phenotype = factor(phenotype, levels = unname(phenotype_labels))
  )

conv_turn <- conv_turn %>%
  group_by(file, transcript_id) %>%
  {
    if ("assistant_idx" %in% names(.)) {
      arrange(., assistant_idx, .by_group = TRUE)
    } else {
      arrange(., row_number(), .by_group = TRUE)
    }
  } %>%
  mutate(turn_index = row_number()) %>%
  ungroup()

## numbers
total_unrepeated_turns <- nrow(conv_turn)
total_conversations    <- length(unique(conv_turn$transcript_id))
total_ratings          <- 39
total_mh_ratings       <- 13
total_reps             <- 3

# Median number of turns per conversation (use *un-padded* data)
turns_per_convo <- conv_turn %>%
  group_by(file, transcript_id) %>%
  summarise(
    n_turns = max(turn_index, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

median_turns_per_convo <- median(turns_per_convo$n_turns, na.rm = TRUE)

# (Optional) also keep a few helpful summaries
iqr_turns_per_convo <- IQR(turns_per_convo$n_turns, na.rm = TRUE)
mean_turns_per_convo <- mean(turns_per_convo$n_turns, na.rm = TRUE)

## fill turns to max turns
MAX_TURNS <- 10L

conv_turn <- conv_turn %>%
  group_by(file, transcript_id) %>%
  arrange(turn_index, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  group_modify(~{
    df <- .x
    last_row <- df %>% slice_tail(n = 1)

    missing_turns <- setdiff(1:MAX_TURNS, df$turn_index)

    if (length(missing_turns) == 0) {
      df
    } else {
      padded <- purrr::map_dfr(
        missing_turns,
        ~ last_row %>% mutate(turn_index = .x)
      )
      bind_rows(df, padded) %>% arrange(turn_index)
    }
  }) %>%
  ungroup()

target_levels <- conv_turn %>%
  distinct(target_model) %>%
  arrange(target_model) %>%
  pull(target_model)

phenotype_levels <- conv_turn %>%
  distinct(phenotype) %>%
  arrange(phenotype) %>%
  pull(phenotype)

conv_turn <- conv_turn %>%
  mutate(
    intention    = dplyr::recode(intention, !!!intention_labels),
    target_model = factor(target_model, levels = target_levels),
    phenotype    = factor(phenotype,   levels = phenotype_levels),
    intention    = factor(intention,   levels = intention_levels)
  )

x_scale_turns <- scale_x_continuous(
  limits = c(1, 10),
  breaks = c(1, 5, 10)
)

y_scale_concerning <- scale_y_continuous(
  limits = c(SCORE_MIN, SCORE_MAX),
  breaks = c(1, 5, 10)
)

indiv_concerning_phenotype <- conv_turn %>%
  filter(!is.na(concerning)) %>%
  transmute(
    target_model,
    phenotype,
    turn_index,
    transcript_id,
    score = concerning
  )


OVERALL_BLUE <- "#08519C"  # change if you want a different one

ALPHA_INDIV <- 0.02
LW_INDIV    <- 0.15
LW_OVERALL  <- 0.5
ALPHA_RIB   <- 0.3

concerning_phenotype_turn <- indiv_concerning_phenotype %>%
  group_by(target_model, phenotype, turn_index) %>%
  summarise_with_ci() %>%
  rename(mean_score = mean)

concerning_phenotype_turn_overall <- indiv_concerning_phenotype %>%
  group_by(phenotype, turn_index) %>%
  summarise_with_ci() %>%
  rename(mean_score = mean) %>%
  mutate(
    target_model = "Overall",
    lower = pmax(lower, SCORE_MIN),
    upper = pmin(upper, SCORE_MAX)
  )

gg_concerning_phenotype_turn <- ggplot() +
  # faint individual trajectories (per model) - OPTIONAL
  # geom_line(
  #   data = indiv_concerning_phenotype,
  #   aes(
  #     x     = turn_index,
  #     y     = score,
  #     group = interaction(target_model, transcript_id),
  #     color = target_model
  #   ),
  #   alpha = ALPHA_INDIV,
  #   linewidth = LW_INDIV
  # ) +
  # model-specific CI ribbons
  geom_ribbon(
    data = concerning_phenotype_turn,
    aes(
      x     = turn_index,
      ymin  = lower,
      ymax  = upper,
      fill  = target_model,
      group = target_model
    ),
    alpha = 0.05,
    colour = NA
  ) +
  geom_line(
    data = concerning_phenotype_turn,
    aes(
      x     = turn_index,
      y     = mean_score,
      color = target_model,
      group = target_model
    ),
    linewidth = 0.5,
    alpha = 0.25
  ) +
  geom_ribbon(
    data = concerning_phenotype_turn_overall,
    aes(
      x     = turn_index,
      ymin  = lower,
      ymax  = upper,
      group = phenotype
    ),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    fill = OVERALL_BLUE,
    alpha = ALPHA_RIB,
    colour = NA
  ) +
  geom_line(
    data = concerning_phenotype_turn_overall,
    aes(
      x     = turn_index,
      y     = mean_score,
      group = phenotype
    ),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    color = OVERALL_BLUE,
    linewidth = LW_OVERALL
  ) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = median_turns_per_convo, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40", linewidth = 0.25) +
  facet_wrap(~ phenotype, nrow = 1) +
  labs(
    x = "Turn",
    y = "Concerning (mean ± 95% CI)",
    title = "A",
    subtitle = "Concerning behavior escalates faster in \nsimulated users with mania and psychosis",
    color = NULL,
    fill  = NULL
  ) +
  x_scale_turns +
  y_scale_concerning +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(1, 10), ylim = c(SCORE_MIN, SCORE_MAX), clip = "on") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_font_size) +
  theme(
    legend.position  = "left",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    legend.key      = element_blank(),
    legend.key.size = unit(0.6, "lines")
  ) +
  guides(
    color = guide_legend(
      nrow  = 9,
      byrow = TRUE,
      override.aes = list(
        linetype  = 1,
        shape     = NA,
        alpha     = 1,
        linewidth = 0.5
      )
    ),
    fill = "none"
  )

gg_concerning_phenotype_turn


indiv_concerning_intention <- conv_turn %>%
  filter(!is.na(concerning)) %>%

  )

df_turn_lm <- conv_turn %>%
  filter(!is.na(concerning)) %>%
  transmute(
    label_id      = as.factor(label_id),
    transcript_id = as.factor(transcript_id),
    turn_index    = as.numeric(turn_index),
    phenotype     = as.factor(phenotype),
    intention     = as.factor(intention),
    target_model  = as.factor(target_model),
    score         = concerning
  )

MOD.turn_main <- lmer(
  score ~ turn_index * phenotype * intention +
    (1 | transcript_id) +
    (1 | target_model:label_id),
  data = df_turn_lm,
  REML = FALSE
)

STAT.turn_main <- anova(MOD.turn_main, type = 3)
```

```{r}
#| label: concerning_trajectory_clustering_all_convos
#| include: false
#| echo: false
#| out.width: "100%"

MAX_TURNS <- 10L
k         <- 4
SEED      <- 1

SCORE_MIN <- 1
SCORE_MAX <- 10

turn_cols <- paste0("t", 1:MAX_TURNS)

traj_long <- conv_turn %>%
  dplyr::select(file, transcript_id, target_model, phenotype, intention,
                turn_index, concerning) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(file, transcript_id) %>%
  tidyr::complete(turn_index = 1:MAX_TURNS) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(turn_index, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  tidyr::fill(target_model, phenotype, intention, .direction = "downup") %>%
  tidyr::fill(concerning, .direction = "down") %>%
  tidyr::fill(concerning, .direction = "up") %>%
  dplyr::ungroup()

traj_wide <- traj_long %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from   = turn_index,
    values_from  = concerning,
    names_prefix = "t"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(dplyr::if_all(dplyr::all_of(turn_cols), ~ !is.na(.x)))

X <- as.matrix(traj_wide[, turn_cols])

# scale for clustering only (keeps clustering shape-based, not absolute scale)
X_scaled <- scale(X)

set.seed(SEED)
km <- kmeans(X_scaled, centers = k, nstart = 50)

traj_cluster_reference <- list(
  center = attr(X_scaled, "scaled:center"),
  scale = attr(X_scaled, "scaled:scale"),
  centers = km$centers,
  raw_levels = levels(factor(km$cluster))
)

traj_wide <- traj_wide %>%
  dplyr::mutate(traj_cluster_raw = factor(km$cluster))

conv_turn_clustered <- conv_turn %>%
  dplyr::inner_join(
    traj_wide %>% dplyr::select(file, transcript_id, traj_cluster_raw),
    by = c("file", "transcript_id")
  )

indiv_cluster_turn <- conv_turn_clustered %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(concerning)) %>%
  dplyr::transmute(
    traj_cluster_raw,
    turn_index,
    transcript_id,
    score = concerning
  )

cluster_turn_summary <- indiv_cluster_turn %>%
  dplyr::group_by(traj_cluster_raw, turn_index) %>%
  summarise_with_ci() %>%
  dplyr::rename(mean_score = mean) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    lower = pmax(lower, SCORE_MIN),
    upper = pmin(upper, SCORE_MAX)
  )

cluster_order <- traj_wide %>%
  dplyr::group_by(traj_cluster_raw) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    mean_t1 = mean(t1, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_t2 = mean(t2, na.rm = TRUE),
    delta12 = mean_t2 - mean_t1,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(delta12) %>%
  dplyr::pull(traj_cluster_raw) %>%
  as.character()

cluster_labels_vec <- c(
  "Low risk",
  "Gradual escalation",
  "Recovery",
  "Early escalation"
)
names(cluster_labels_vec) <- cluster_order
cluster_labels <- cluster_labels_vec

library(RColorBrewer)
cluster_colors <- setNames(
  brewer.pal(9, "Blues")[c(5, 6, 8, 9)],
  c("Low risk", "Recovery", "Gradual escalation", "Early escalation")
)

indiv_cluster_turn <- indiv_cluster_turn %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    traj_cluster = factor(
      as.character(traj_cluster_raw),
      levels = names(cluster_labels),
      labels = cluster_labels
    )
  )

cluster_turn_summary <- cluster_turn_summary %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    traj_cluster = factor(
      as.character(traj_cluster_raw),
      levels = names(cluster_labels),
      labels = cluster_labels
    )
  )

traj_wide <- traj_wide %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    traj_cluster = factor(
      as.character(traj_cluster_raw),
      levels = names(cluster_labels),
      labels = cluster_labels
    )
  )

gg_traj_clusters <- ggplot() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = median_turns_per_convo, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40", linewidth = 0.25) +
  geom_ribbon(
    data = cluster_turn_summary,
    aes(
      x = turn_index,
      ymin = lower, ymax = upper,
      fill = traj_cluster,
      group = traj_cluster
    ),
    alpha = 0.18,
    colour = NA
  ) +
  geom_line(
    data = cluster_turn_summary,
    aes(
      x = turn_index, y = mean_score,
      color = traj_cluster,
      group = traj_cluster
    ),
    linewidth = 0.5
  ) +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Dark2") +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Dark2") +
  labs(
    x = "Turn",
    y = "Concerning (mean ± 95% CI)",
    color = NULL,
    fill  = NULL,
    title = "C",
    subtitle = "Four trajectory archetypes"
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(1, 10), ylim = c(SCORE_MIN, SCORE_MAX), clip = "on") +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(1, 10), breaks = c(1, 5, 10)) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_font_size) +
  theme(
    legend.position  = "left",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    legend.key      = element_blank(),
    legend.key.size = unit(0.6, "lines")
  ) +
  guides(
    color = guide_legend(
      nrow  = 9,
      byrow = TRUE,
      override.aes = list(
        linetype  = 1,
        shape     = NA,
        alpha     = 1,
        linewidth = 0.5
      )
    ),
    fill = "none"
  )

gg_traj_clusters

meta_cluster <- traj_wide %>%
  dplyr::count(target_model, phenotype, intention, traj_cluster, name = "n_convos")

meta_long <- bind_rows(
  meta_cluster %>%
    dplyr::group_by(phenotype, traj_cluster) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(n_convos = sum(n_convos), .groups = "drop") %>%
    dplyr::mutate(facet = "Vulnerability", group = phenotype),

  meta_cluster %>%
    dplyr::group_by(intention, traj_cluster) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(n_convos = sum(n_convos), .groups = "drop") %>%
    dplyr::mutate(facet = "Intent", group = intention),

  meta_cluster %>%
    dplyr::group_by(target_model, traj_cluster) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(n_convos = sum(n_convos), .groups = "drop") %>%
    dplyr::mutate(facet = "AI chatbot", group = target_model)
) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(facet, group) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(frac = n_convos / sum(n_convos)) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    facet = factor(facet, levels = c("Vulnerability", "Intent", "AI chatbot"))
  )

gg_cluster_composition <- ggplot(meta_long, aes(x = group, y = frac, fill = traj_cluster)) +
  geom_col(position = "fill", width = 0.5) +   # <-- 50% bar thickness
  facet_wrap(~ facet, nrow = 1, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Dark2") +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Dark2") +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Fraction of conversations",
    fill = "Trajectory class",
    title = "D",
    subtitle = "Trajectory class varies by vulnerability, intent, and AI chatbot"
  ) + coord_flip() +
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_font_size) +
  theme(
    legend.position   = "none",
    legend.key.width  = unit(0.3, "lines"),
    legend.spacing.x  = unit(0.8, "lines"),
    legend.text       = element_text(size = base_font_size * 0.8),
    axis.text.x       = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0),
    panel.grid.major  = element_line(color = "grey90", linewidth = 0.4),
    panel.grid.minor  = element_line(color = "grey95", linewidth = 0.2)
  ) + scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(0, 0.5, 1), limits = c(0, 1))

gg_cluster_composition

cluster_lookup <- traj_wide %>%
  dplyr::select(file, transcript_id, target_model, phenotype, intention, traj_cluster)

cluster_lookup %>%
  dplyr::filter(traj_cluster == "Recovery")
```

```{r}
#| label: traj_cluster_diagnostics
#| include: false
#| echo: false

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(cluster)   # silhouette + clusGap
library(tibble)

meta_traj_preproc <- list(
  MAX_TURNS = MAX_TURNS,
  k_chosen  = k,
  scaling_for_clustering = "z-score (scale()) applied to trajectories; clustering performed on scaled X, Euclidean distance implied by k-means"
)

n_total_convos_raw <- conv_turn %>% distinct(file, transcript_id) %>% nrow()
n_convos_complete  <- traj_wide %>% nrow()
n_convos_dropped   <- n_total_convos_raw - n_convos_complete
cluster_counts <- traj_wide %>%
  count(traj_cluster, name = "n_convos") %>%
  mutate(frac = n_convos / sum(n_convos))


k_grid <- 3:10

set.seed(SEED)
elbow_df <- purrr::map_dfr(k_grid, function(k_) {
  km_ <- kmeans(X_scaled, centers = k_, nstart = 50)
  tibble(k = k_, tot_withinss = km_$tot.withinss)
})

gg_elbow <- ggplot(elbow_df, aes(x = k, y = tot_withinss)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_point(size = 1.1) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = k, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.3) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_font_size) +
  labs(
    x = "Number of clusters (k)",
    y = "Total within-cluster sum of squares",
    title = NULL,
    subtitle = "Elbow diagnostic"
  )

D_euc <- dist(X_scaled, method = "euclidean")

sil_df <- purrr::map_dfr(k_grid, function(k_) {
  set.seed(SEED)
  km_ <- kmeans(X_scaled, centers = k_, nstart = 50)
  sil_ <- silhouette(km_$cluster, D_euc)
  tibble(k = k_, avg_sil_width = mean(sil_[, "sil_width"]))
})

k_sil_best <- sil_df %>% slice_max(avg_sil_width, n = 1) %>% pull(k)

gg_silhouette <- ggplot(sil_df, aes(x = k, y = avg_sil_width)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_point(size = 1.1) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = k, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.3) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_font_size) +
  labs(
    x = "Number of clusters (k)",
    y = "Average silhouette width",
    subtitle = "Silhouette diagnostic (Euclidean distance) identifies k = 4 optimal clusters"
  )
```

```{r}
#| label: concerning_trajectory_clustering_all_convos_alt_scores
#| include: false
#| echo: false
#| out.width: "100%"

MAX_TURNS <- 10L
k         <- 4
SEED      <- 1

SCORE_MIN <- 1
SCORE_MAX <- 10

turn_cols_alt <- paste0("t", 1:MAX_TURNS)

conv_turn_cluster_raw_alt <- read_csv(
  "../out/v1/results/conv_turns_full.csv",
  show_col_types = FALSE
) %>%
  mutate(
    target_model = sub("^([^/]+/){2}", "", target_model),
    concerning  = pmin(pmax(concerning, SCORE_MIN), SCORE_MAX),
    phenotype = dplyr::recode(phenotype, !!!phenotype_labels),
    phenotype = factor(phenotype, levels = unname(phenotype_labels)),
    intention = dplyr::recode(intention, !!!intention_labels),
    target_model = factor(target_model, levels = target_levels),
    phenotype = factor(phenotype, levels = phenotype_levels),
    intention = factor(intention, levels = intention_levels)
  ) %>%
  group_by(file, transcript_id) %>%
  {
    if ("assistant_idx" %in% names(.)) {
      arrange(., assistant_idx, .by_group = TRUE)
    } else {
      arrange(., row_number(), .by_group = TRUE)
    }
  } %>%
  mutate(turn_index = row_number()) %>%
  ungroup()

cluster_alt_scores_path <- "../out/v1_ten_turns/analysis/turn_scores_latest_long.csv"
cluster_has_alt_scores <- file.exists(cluster_alt_scores_path)

traj_meta_alt <- conv_turn_cluster_raw_alt %>%
  group_by(file, transcript_id) %>%
  summarise(
    target_model = first(target_model),
    phenotype = first(phenotype),
    intention = first(intention),
    original_n_turns = max(turn_index, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

orig_scores_cluster_alt <- conv_turn_cluster_raw_alt %>%
  select(file, transcript_id, turn_index, concerning_orig = concerning)

if (cluster_has_alt_scores) {
  cluster_alt_scores <- read_csv(
    cluster_alt_scores_path,
    show_col_types = FALSE
  ) %>%
    mutate(
      target_model = sub("^([^/]+/){2}", "", target_model),
      concerning = pmin(pmax(concerning, SCORE_MIN), SCORE_MAX)
    ) %>%
    select(transcript_id, turn_index, concerning_ext = concerning)
} else {
  cluster_alt_scores <- tibble(
    transcript_id = character(),
    turn_index = integer(),
    concerning_ext = double()
  )
}

traj_long_alt <- traj_meta_alt %>%
  tidyr::expand_grid(turn_index = 1:MAX_TURNS) %>%
  left_join(
    orig_scores_cluster_alt,
    by = c("file", "transcript_id", "turn_index")
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    cluster_alt_scores,
    by = c("transcript_id", "turn_index")
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    concerning_selected = dplyr::coalesce(concerning_orig, concerning_ext),
    turn_source = dplyr::case_when(
      !is.na(concerning_orig) ~ "original",
      is.na(concerning_orig) & !is.na(concerning_ext) ~ "extended",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) %>%
  group_by(file, transcript_id) %>%
  arrange(turn_index, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(concerning = concerning_selected) %>%
  tidyr::fill(concerning, .direction = "down") %>%
  tidyr::fill(concerning, .direction = "up") %>%
  mutate(
    turn_source = dplyr::case_when(
      !is.na(turn_source) ~ turn_source,
      !is.na(concerning) ~ "padded",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

traj_cluster_merge_by_convo_alt <- traj_long_alt %>%
  group_by(transcript_id) %>%
  summarise(
    original_n_turns = first(original_n_turns),
    used_extended = any(turn_source == "extended"),
    used_padding = any(turn_source == "padded"),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

traj_cluster_merge_diagnostics_alt <- tibble::tibble(
  metric = c(
    "Conversations already at 10 turns in original audit",
    "Conversations with at least one extended turn score used",
    "Conversations requiring padding after extension lookup",
    "Turn scores taken from original audit",
    "Turn scores taken from extended 10-turn audit",
    "Turn scores created by padding"
  ),
  value = c(
    sum(traj_cluster_merge_by_convo_alt$original_n_turns >= MAX_TURNS, na.rm = TRUE),
    sum(traj_cluster_merge_by_convo_alt$used_extended, na.rm = TRUE),
    sum(traj_cluster_merge_by_convo_alt$used_padding, na.rm = TRUE),
    sum(traj_long_alt$turn_source == "original", na.rm = TRUE),
    sum(traj_long_alt$turn_source == "extended", na.rm = TRUE),
    sum(traj_long_alt$turn_source == "padded", na.rm = TRUE)
  )
)

readr::write_csv(
  traj_cluster_merge_diagnostics_alt,
  "../out/v1_ten_turns/analysis/cluster_turn_score_merge_diagnostics.csv"
)

traj_wide_alt <- traj_long_alt %>%
  dplyr::select(file, transcript_id, target_model, phenotype, intention, turn_index, concerning) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    id_cols      = c(file, transcript_id, target_model, phenotype, intention),
    names_from   = turn_index,
    values_from  = concerning,
    names_prefix = "t"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(dplyr::if_all(dplyr::all_of(turn_cols_alt), ~ !is.na(.x)))

X_alt <- as.matrix(traj_wide_alt[, turn_cols_alt])

# project extended trajectories into the original padded-data clustering space
X_scaled_alt <- scale(
  X_alt,
  center = traj_cluster_reference$center,
  scale = traj_cluster_reference$scale
)

center_dist_sq_alt <- sapply(seq_len(nrow(traj_cluster_reference$centers)), function(j) {
  rowSums(
    (
      X_scaled_alt -
        matrix(
          traj_cluster_reference$centers[j, ],
          nrow = nrow(X_scaled_alt),
          ncol = ncol(X_scaled_alt),
          byrow = TRUE
        )
    )^2
  )
})

cluster_assign_alt <- max.col(-center_dist_sq_alt, ties.method = "first")

traj_wide_alt <- traj_wide_alt %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    traj_cluster_raw = factor(
      cluster_assign_alt,
      levels = traj_cluster_reference$raw_levels
    )
  )

conv_turn_clustered_alt <- traj_long_alt %>%
  dplyr::inner_join(
    traj_wide_alt %>% dplyr::select(file, transcript_id, traj_cluster_raw),
    by = c("file", "transcript_id")
  )

indiv_cluster_turn_alt <- conv_turn_clustered_alt %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(concerning)) %>%
  dplyr::transmute(
    traj_cluster_raw,
    turn_index,
    transcript_id,
    score = concerning
  )

cluster_turn_summary_alt <- indiv_cluster_turn_alt %>%
  dplyr::group_by(traj_cluster_raw, turn_index) %>%
  summarise_with_ci() %>%
  dplyr::rename(mean_score = mean) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    lower = pmax(lower, SCORE_MIN),
    upper = pmin(upper, SCORE_MAX)
  )

indiv_cluster_turn_alt <- indiv_cluster_turn_alt %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    traj_cluster = factor(
      as.character(traj_cluster_raw),
      levels = names(cluster_labels),
      labels = cluster_labels
    )
  )

cluster_turn_summary_alt <- cluster_turn_summary_alt %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    traj_cluster = factor(
      as.character(traj_cluster_raw),
      levels = names(cluster_labels),
      labels = cluster_labels
    )
  )

traj_wide_alt <- traj_wide_alt %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    traj_cluster = factor(
      as.character(traj_cluster_raw),
      levels = names(cluster_labels),
      labels = cluster_labels
    )
  )

gg_traj_clusters_alt <- ggplot() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = median_turns_per_convo, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40", linewidth = 0.25) +
  geom_ribbon(
    data = cluster_turn_summary_alt,
    aes(
      x = turn_index,
      ymin = lower, ymax = upper,
      fill = traj_cluster,
      group = traj_cluster
    ),
    alpha = 0.18,
    colour = NA
  ) +
  geom_line(
    data = cluster_turn_summary_alt,
    aes(
      x = turn_index, y = mean_score,
      color = traj_cluster,
      group = traj_cluster
    ),
    linewidth = 0.5
  ) +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Dark2") +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Dark2") +
  labs(
    x = "Turn",
    y = "Concerning (mean ± 95% CI)",
    color = NULL,
    fill  = NULL,
    title = "C",
    subtitle = "Four trajectory archetypes"
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(1, 10), ylim = c(SCORE_MIN, SCORE_MAX), clip = "on") +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(1, 10), breaks = c(1, 5, 10)) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_font_size) +
  theme(
    legend.position  = "left",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    legend.key      = element_blank(),
    legend.key.size = unit(0.6, "lines")
  ) +
  guides(
    color = guide_legend(
      nrow  = 9,
      byrow = TRUE,
      override.aes = list(
        linetype  = 1,
        shape     = NA,
        alpha     = 1,
        linewidth = 0.5
      )
    ),
    fill = "none"
  )

meta_cluster_alt <- traj_wide_alt %>%
  dplyr::count(target_model, phenotype, intention, traj_cluster, name = "n_convos")

meta_long_alt <- bind_rows(
  meta_cluster_alt %>%
    dplyr::group_by(phenotype, traj_cluster) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(n_convos = sum(n_convos), .groups = "drop") %>%
    dplyr::mutate(facet = "Vulnerability", group = phenotype),

  meta_cluster_alt %>%
    dplyr::group_by(intention, traj_cluster) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(n_convos = sum(n_convos), .groups = "drop") %>%
    dplyr::mutate(facet = "Intent", group = intention),

  meta_cluster_alt %>%
    dplyr::group_by(target_model, traj_cluster) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(n_convos = sum(n_convos), .groups = "drop") %>%
    dplyr::mutate(facet = "AI chatbot", group = target_model)
) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(facet, group) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(frac = n_convos / sum(n_convos)) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    facet = factor(facet, levels = c("Vulnerability", "Intent", "AI chatbot"))
  )

gg_cluster_composition_alt <- ggplot(meta_long_alt, aes(x = group, y = frac, fill = traj_cluster)) +
  geom_col(position = "fill", width = 0.5) +
  facet_wrap(~ facet, nrow = 1, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Dark2") +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Dark2") +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Fraction of conversations",
    fill = "Trajectory class",
    title = "D",
    subtitle = "Trajectory class varies by vulnerability, intent, and AI chatbot"
  ) + coord_flip() +
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_font_size) +
  theme(
    legend.position   = "none",
    legend.key.width  = unit(0.3, "lines"),
    legend.spacing.x  = unit(0.8, "lines"),
    legend.text       = element_text(size = base_font_size * 0.8),
    axis.text.x       = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0),
    panel.grid.major  = element_line(color = "grey90", linewidth = 0.4),
    panel.grid.minor  = element_line(color = "grey95", linewidth = 0.2)
  ) + scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(0, 0.5, 1), limits = c(0, 1))

cluster_lookup_alt <- traj_wide_alt %>%
  dplyr::select(file, transcript_id, target_model, phenotype, intention, traj_cluster)
```

```{r}
#| label: time_to_thresh_heatmap_intent
#| include: false
#| echo: false
#| out.width: "100%"

THRESH <- 5
MAX_TURNS <- 10L

# time-to-threshold per transcript, then average within phenotype × intent
tt_grid <- conv_turn %>%
  filter(!is.na(concerning)) %>%
  group_by(transcript_id, phenotype, intention) %>%
  summarise(
    t_hit = if (any(concerning >= THRESH)) min(turn_index[concerning >= THRESH]) else MAX_TURNS,
    .groups = "drop"
  )

sum_t_hit_grid <- tt_grid %>%
  group_by(phenotype, intention) %>%
  summarise(
    mean  = mean_ci_95(t_hit)$mean,
    error = mean_ci_95(t_hit)$error,
    lower = mean_ci_95(t_hit)$lower,
    upper = mean_ci_95(t_hit)$upper,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    phenotype = factor(phenotype, levels = levels(conv_turn$phenotype)),
    intention = factor(intention, levels = levels(conv_turn$intention)),
    label = sprintf("%.1f\n[%.1f–%.1f]", mean, lower, upper),
    txt_col = ifelse(mean > (MAX_TURNS / 2), "white", "grey15")  # same logic style as your heatmap
  )

gg_t_hit_heatmap <- ggplot(
  sum_t_hit_grid,
  aes(x = intention, y = phenotype, fill = mean)
) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = label, color = txt_col),
    size = 2.5,
    lineheight = 0.95
  ) +
  scale_color_identity() +
  scale_fill_viridis(
    name = paste0("Turns to reach concerning behavior score ≥ ", THRESH),
    option = "D",
    direction = -1,  # IMPORTANT: lower turns = earlier risk => darker/high end if you like
    #limits = c(1, MAX_TURNS),
    #breaks = c(1, 5, 10),
    guide = guide_colorbar(
      title.position = "top",
      title.hjust    = 0.5,
      barwidth       = unit(3, "cm"),
      barheight      = unit(0.25, "cm")
    )
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Intent",
    y = "Vulnerability",
    title = NULL,
    subtitle = "Some vulnerability–intent pairings reach elevated risk earlier"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_font_size) +
  theme(
    legend.position  = "bottom",
    legend.direction = "horizontal",
    legend.title     = element_text(margin = margin(b = 4)),
    axis.text.x      = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    panel.grid       = element_blank()
  )

gg_t_hit_heatmap
```

```{r}
#| label: pca_structure
#| include: false
#| echo: false
#| out.width: "100%"

library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)
library(ggcorrplot)

OUTDIR <- "../out/v1/analysis/mechanisms"
FIGDIR <- file.path(OUTDIR, "figures")
dir.create(FIGDIR, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

scores_df <- read_csv(file.path(OUTDIR, "pca_conv_scores.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
load_df   <- read_csv(file.path(OUTDIR, "pca_mech_loadings_pc1_pc2.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
base_df   <- read_csv(file.path(OUTDIR, "conv_mechanisms_base.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)

intention_labels <- c(
  "Belief validation"                  = "Belief validation",
  "Dependence and anthropomorphism"    = "Dependence",
  "Glorification / romanticization"    = "Glorification",
  "Reassurance and avoidance"          = "Avoidance",
  "Risky action permission / planning" = "Risky action",
  "Trivialization / minimization"      = "Minimization"
)

phenotype_labels <- c(
  "DEPRESSION"           = "Depression",
  "PSYCHOSIS"            = "Psychosis",
  "OCD"                  = "OCD",
  "MANIA_HYPOMANIA"      = "Mania",
  "INSECURE_ATTACHMENT"  = "IA"
)

# desired orders
phenotype_levels <- c("Depression", "Psychosis", "OCD", "Mania", "IA")
intention_levels <- c(
  "Belief validation", "Dependence", "Glorification",
  "Avoidance", "Risky action", "Minimization"
)

# clean target_model display: keep only suffix after last "/"
scores_df <- scores_df %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    target_model = sub("^.*/", "", target_model),
    intention = dplyr::recode(intention, !!!intention_labels),
    phenotype = dplyr::recode(phenotype, !!!phenotype_labels),
    intention = factor(intention, levels = intention_levels),
    phenotype = factor(phenotype, levels = phenotype_levels),
    target_model = factor(target_model, levels = sort(unique(target_model)))
  )

mechanism_labels <- c(
  "score__concerning"                              = "Concerning",
  "score__mh_therapeutic_quality_inverted"         = "Low therapeutic quality",
  "score__mh_therapeutic_quality"                  = "Therapeutic quality",
  "score__self_harm_or_suicide_enablement"         = "Self-harm enablement",
  "score__unprompted_sycophancy"                   = "Sycophancy",
  "score__mh_maladaptive_belief_reinforcement"     = "Belief reinforcement",
  "score__mh_risky_action_enablement"              = "Risky action enablement",
  "score__mh_avoidance_and_reassurance_loops"      = "Avoidance / reassurance loops",
  "score__mh_boundary_and_dependence_risk"         = "Boundary / dependence risk",
  "score__mh_minimization_of_risk_or_symptoms"     = "Minimization of risk/symptoms",
  "score__mh_glorification_or_romanticization"     = "Glorification / romanticization",
  "score__mh_medical_advice"                       = "Medical advice risk",
  "score__mh_harm_to_others"                       = "Harm to others",
  "score__mh_stigma_and_invalidation"              = "Stigma / invalidation"
)

mech_cols <- names(base_df)[grepl("^score__", names(base_df))]

X <- base_df %>%
  dplyr::select(dplyr::all_of(mech_cols)) %>%
  tidyr::drop_na()

corr_mat <- cor(X, use = "pairwise.complete.obs", method = "spearman")

hc  <- hclust(as.dist(1 - corr_mat), method = "average")
ord <- hc$order
corr_ord <- corr_mat[ord, ord]

axis_labs <- colnames(corr_ord)
axis_labs_pretty <- unname(ifelse(axis_labs %in% names(mechanism_labels),
                                  mechanism_labels[axis_labs],
                                  axis_labs))
colnames(corr_ord) <- axis_labs_pretty
rownames(corr_ord) <- axis_labs_pretty

ARROW_SCALE <- 1
sx <- (max(scores_df$PC1, na.rm = TRUE) - min(scores_df$PC1, na.rm = TRUE)) * ARROW_SCALE
sy <- (max(scores_df$PC2, na.rm = TRUE) - min(scores_df$PC2, na.rm = TRUE)) * ARROW_SCALE

arrows_df <- load_df %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    xend = PC1_loading * sx,
    yend = PC2_loading * sy
  )

summarise_pc_ci <- function(.df) {
  .df %>%
    dplyr::summarise(
      n = dplyr::n(),
      PC1_mean = mean(PC1, na.rm = TRUE),
      PC2_mean = mean(PC2, na.rm = TRUE),
      PC1_se   = sd(PC1, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n),
      PC2_se   = sd(PC2, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n),
      PC1_l    = PC1_mean - 1.96 * PC1_se,
      PC1_u    = PC1_mean + 1.96 * PC1_se,
      PC2_l    = PC2_mean - 1.96 * PC2_se,
      PC2_u    = PC2_mean + 1.96 * PC2_se,
      .groups = "drop"
    )
}

model_summary <- scores_df %>%
  dplyr::group_by(target_model) %>%
  summarise_pc_ci()

theme_like_main <- theme_minimal(base_size = base_font_size) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    legend.position      = "top",
    legend.direction     = "horizontal",
    legend.justification = "right",

    legend.box.margin = margin(b = 2),
    legend.spacing.x  = unit(6, "pt"),
    legend.spacing.y  = unit(0, "pt"),
    legend.key.height = unit(6, "pt"),

    legend.background = element_blank(),
    legend.key = element_blank()
  )

guide_like_main <- guides(
  color = guide_legend(
    nrow = 4,
    byrow = TRUE,
    override.aes = list(alpha = 1, size = 1, linewidth = 0)
  )
)

p_pca_mapping <- ggplot(scores_df, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = target_model)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.55, size = 0.5) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40", linewidth = 0.4) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40", linewidth = 0.4) +
  geom_segment(
    data = arrows_df,
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    aes(x = 0, y = 0, xend = xend, yend = yend),
    linewidth = 0.4,
    alpha = 0.9,
    color = "grey15",
    arrow = arrow(length = unit(3, "pt"))
  ) +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
    data = arrows_df,
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    aes(x = xend, y = yend, label = label),
    size = 2.2,
    max.overlaps = Inf,
    box.padding = 0.35,
    point.padding = 0.2,
    segment.alpha = 0.45,
    segment.size = 0.25,
    min.segment.length = 0
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "PC1",
    y = "PC2",
    title = "A",
    subtitle = "The multidimensional risk space of AI chatbots",
    color = NULL
  ) +
  theme_like_main +
  guide_like_main

p_pca_mapping

phen_levels <- phenotype_levels

scores_pheno_facet <- dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(phen_levels, function(focus) {
  scores_df %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      facet_focus = factor(focus, levels = phen_levels),  # <- enforce order
      is_focus = (phenotype == focus)
    )
}))

facet_pheno_summary <- scores_pheno_facet %>%
  dplyr::group_by(facet_focus, target_model) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n = sum(is_focus),
    PC1_mean = mean(PC1[is_focus], na.rm = TRUE),
    PC2_mean = mean(PC2[is_focus], na.rm = TRUE),
    PC1_se   = sd(PC1[is_focus], na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(pmax(n, 1)),
    PC2_se   = sd(PC2[is_focus], na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(pmax(n, 1)),
    PC1_l    = PC1_mean - 1.96 * PC1_se,
    PC1_u    = PC1_mean + 1.96 * PC1_se,
    PC2_l    = PC2_mean - 1.96 * PC2_se,
    PC2_u    = PC2_mean + 1.96 * PC2_se,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(facet_focus = factor(facet_focus, levels = phen_levels))  # <- enforce order

p_pca_phenotype <- ggplot(scores_pheno_facet, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = target_model)) +
  geom_point(aes(alpha = is_focus), size = 0.5) +
  scale_alpha_manual(values = c(`FALSE` = 0.03, `TRUE` = 0.1), guide = "none") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40", linewidth = 0.35) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40", linewidth = 0.35) +
  geom_linerange(
    data = facet_pheno_summary,
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    aes(x = PC1_mean, ymin = PC2_l, ymax = PC2_u, color = target_model),
    linewidth = 0.55
  ) +
  geom_linerange(
    data = facet_pheno_summary,
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    aes(y = PC2_mean, xmin = PC1_l, xmax = PC1_u, color = target_model),
    linewidth = 0.55
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = facet_pheno_summary,
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    aes(x = PC1_mean, y = PC2_mean, fill = target_model),
    shape = 21, color = "black",
    stroke = group_dot_stroke, size = group_dot_size
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ facet_focus, nrow = 1) +
  labs(
    x = "PC1",
    y = "PC2",
    title = "B",
    subtitle = "Simulated vulnerabilities shift conversations along orthogonal risk axes",
    color = NULL
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-4, 6), breaks = c(-4, 0, 4)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-2.5, 3)) +
  theme_like_main +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    strip.text = element_text(size = rel(0.95))
  )

p_pca_phenotype

intent_levels <- intention_levels

scores_intent_facet <- dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(intent_levels, function(focus) {
  scores_df %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      facet_focus = factor(focus, levels = intent_levels),  # <- enforce order
      is_focus = (intention == focus)
    )
}))

facet_intent_summary <- scores_intent_facet %>%
  dplyr::group_by(facet_focus, target_model) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n = sum(is_focus),
    PC1_mean = mean(PC1[is_focus], na.rm = TRUE),
    PC2_mean = mean(PC2[is_focus], na.rm = TRUE),
    PC1_se   = sd(PC1[is_focus], na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(pmax(n, 1)),
    PC2_se   = sd(PC2[is_focus], na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(pmax(n, 1)),
    PC1_l    = PC1_mean - 1.96 * PC1_se,
    PC1_u    = PC1_mean + 1.96 * PC1_se,
    PC2_l    = PC2_mean - 1.96 * PC2_se,
    PC2_u    = PC2_mean + 1.96 * PC2_se,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(facet_focus = factor(facet_focus, levels = intent_levels))  # <- enforce order

p_pca_intentions <- ggplot(scores_intent_facet, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = target_model)) +
  geom_point(aes(alpha = is_focus), size = 0.5) +
  scale_alpha_manual(values = c(`FALSE` = 0.03, `TRUE` = 0.1), guide = "none") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40", linewidth = 0.35) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40", linewidth = 0.35) +
  geom_linerange(
    data = facet_intent_summary,
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    aes(x = PC1_mean, ymin = PC2_l, ymax = PC2_u, color = target_model),
    linewidth = 0.55
  ) +
  geom_linerange(
    data = facet_intent_summary,
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    aes(y = PC2_mean, xmin = PC1_l, xmax = PC1_u, color = target_model),
    linewidth = 0.55
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = facet_intent_summary,
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    aes(x = PC1_mean, y = PC2_mean, fill = target_model),
    shape = 21, color = "black",
    stroke = group_dot_stroke, size = group_dot_size
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ facet_focus, nrow = 1) +
  labs(
    x = "PC1",
    y = "PC2",
    title = "C",
    subtitle = "Simulated intents shift conversations along orthogonal risk axes",
    color = NULL
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-4, 6), breaks = c(-4, 0, 4)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-2.5, 3)) +
  theme_like_main +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    strip.text = element_text(size = rel(0.95))
  )

p_pca_intentions
```

```{r}
#| label: pca_space_stats
#| include: false
#| echo: false

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(car)

df_pca <- scores_df %>%
  select(PC1, PC2, phenotype, intention, target_model) %>%
  drop_na() %>%
  mutate(
    phenotype    = factor(phenotype),
    intention    = factor(intention),
    target_model = factor(target_model)
  )

MOD.pca_mv  <- lm(cbind(PC1, PC2) ~ phenotype * intention * target_model, data = df_pca)
STAT.pca_mv <- car::Manova(MOD.pca_mv, type = "III")


# 1) capture console print as text
txt <- capture.output(print(STAT.pca_mv))
txt <- txt[nzchar(trimws(txt))]

# 2) keep only the table body (from header row to before "Signif. codes")
i_head <- which(grepl("^\\s*Df\\s+test stat\\s+approx F\\s+num Df\\s+den Df\\s+Pr\\(>F\\)", txt))[1]
i_end  <- which(grepl("^\\s*---\\s*$|^\\s*Signif\\. codes:", txt))[1]
tab_lines <- txt[i_head:(i_end - 1)]

# drop the header line
tab_lines <- tab_lines[-1]

parse_row <- function(line) {
  tok <- strsplit(trimws(line), "\\s+")[[1]]

  term      <- tok[1]
  df_       <- as.numeric(tok[2])
  test_stat <- as.numeric(tok[3])
  approx_F  <- as.numeric(tok[4])
  num_df    <- as.numeric(tok[5])
  den_df    <- as.numeric(tok[6])

  # p-value can be:
  #   "1.386e-10" (possibly with stars)
  #   "<" "2.2e-16" "***"
  if (length(tok) < 7) {
    p_val <- NA_real_
  } else if (tok[7] == "<") {
    # take the numeric token after "<", strip any trailing stars
    p_val <- as.numeric(sub("\\*+$", "", tok[8]))
  } else {
    # standard case: token 7 might have trailing stars
    p_val <- as.numeric(sub("\\*+$", "", tok[7]))
  }

  data.frame(
    term        = term,
    Df          = df_,
    `test stat` = test_stat,
    `approx F`  = approx_F,
    `num Df`    = num_df,
    `den Df`    = den_df,
    `Pr(>F)`    = p_val,
    check.names = FALSE
  )
}

STAT.pca_mv_pillai <- do.call(rbind, lapply(tab_lines, parse_row))

stat_mv <- function(term, col) {
  out <- STAT.pca_mv_pillai %>%
    dplyr::filter(.data$term == term) %>%
    dplyr::pull(.data[[col]])
  out[[1]]
}
```

```{r}
#| label: causal_PC_space
#| include: false
#| echo: false
#| cache: true
#| out.width: "100%"
#| 
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)

OUTDIR <- "../out/v1/analysis/mechanisms"
FIGDIR <- file.path(OUTDIR, "figures")
dir.create(FIGDIR, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

scores_df <- readr::read_csv(file.path(OUTDIR, "pca_conv_scores.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
load_df   <- readr::read_csv(file.path(OUTDIR, "pca_mech_loadings_pc1_pc2.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)

MANIP_PATH <- "../out/v1/val/target_grok-4_judge_sonnet-4.5/jobs_with_pca.csv"
manip_df_raw <- readr::read_csv(MANIP_PATH, show_col_types = FALSE)


risk_dim_map <- c(
  setNames(unname(mechanism_labels), sub("^score__", "", names(mechanism_labels))), # raw keys
  mechanism_labels                                                                  # score__ keys
)

allowed_raw_keys <- sub("^score__", "", names(mechanism_labels))
allowed_score_keys <- names(mechanism_labels)

ARROW_SCALE <- 1
sx <- (max(scores_df$PC1, na.rm = TRUE) - min(scores_df$PC1, na.rm = TRUE)) * ARROW_SCALE
sy <- (max(scores_df$PC2, na.rm = TRUE) - min(scores_df$PC2, na.rm = TRUE)) * ARROW_SCALE

arrows_df <- load_df %>%
  mutate(
    xend  = PC1_loading * sx,
    yend  = PC2_loading * sy,
    label = if ("label" %in% names(.)) label else mech_col
  )


risk_level_labels <- c("low_risk" = "Low", "high_risk" = "High")

manip_df <- manip_df_raw %>%
  rename(PC1 = pca_score__PC1, PC2 = pca_score__PC2) %>%
  mutate(
    PC1 = as.numeric(PC1),
    PC2 = as.numeric(PC2),

    risk_dimension_raw = as.character(risk_dimension),

    # KEEP ONLY allowed dimensions (either raw or score__ form)
    .keep_dim = (risk_dimension_raw %in% allowed_raw_keys) | (risk_dimension_raw %in% allowed_score_keys)
  ) %>%
  filter(.keep_dim) %>%
  mutate(
    # pretty label
    risk_dimension = if_else(
      risk_dimension_raw %in% names(risk_dim_map),
      unname(risk_dim_map[risk_dimension_raw]),
      risk_dimension_raw
    ),

    risk_level_raw = as.character(risk_level),
    risk_level = if_else(
      risk_level_raw %in% names(risk_level_labels),
      unname(risk_level_labels[risk_level_raw]),
      risk_level_raw
    ),
    risk_level = factor(risk_level, levels = c("Low", "High"))
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(PC1), !is.na(PC2)) %>%
  select(-.keep_dim)

summ_manip <- manip_df %>%
  group_by(risk_dimension, risk_level) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    PC1_mean = mean_ci_95(PC1)$mean,
    PC1_l    = mean_ci_95(PC1)$lower,
    PC1_u    = mean_ci_95(PC1)$upper,
    PC2_mean = mean_ci_95(PC2)$mean,
    PC2_l    = mean_ci_95(PC2)$lower,
    PC2_u    = mean_ci_95(PC2)$upper,
    .groups = "drop"
  )

segments_df <- summ_manip %>%
  select(risk_dimension, risk_level, PC1_mean, PC2_mean) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from  = risk_level,
    values_from = c(PC1_mean, PC2_mean),
    values_fn   = list
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    PC1_mean_Low  = purrr::map_dbl(PC1_mean_Low,  ~ .x[1]),
    PC1_mean_High = purrr::map_dbl(PC1_mean_High, ~ .x[1]),
    PC2_mean_Low  = purrr::map_dbl(PC2_mean_Low,  ~ .x[1]),
    PC2_mean_High = purrr::map_dbl(PC2_mean_High, ~ .x[1])
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(PC1_mean_Low), !is.na(PC1_mean_High), !is.na(PC2_mean_Low), !is.na(PC2_mean_High)) %>%
  transmute(
    risk_dimension,
    x = PC1_mean_Low,  y = PC2_mean_Low,
    xend = PC1_mean_High, yend = PC2_mean_High
  )

# label only High points
label_df <- summ_manip %>%
  filter(risk_level == "High") %>%
  mutate(label = risk_dimension)

xlim_all <- range(scores_df$PC1, na.rm = TRUE)
ylim_all <- range(scores_df$PC2, na.rm = TRUE)

p_manip_on_map_single <- ggplot() +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40", linewidth = 0.4) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40", linewidth = 0.4) +

  geom_segment(
    data = arrows_df,
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    aes(x = 0, y = 0, xend = xend, yend = yend),
    linewidth = 0.4,
    alpha = 0.9,
    color = "grey15",
    arrow = arrow(length = unit(3, "pt"))
  ) +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
    data = arrows_df,
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    aes(x = xend, y = yend, label = label),
    size = 2.2,
    max.overlaps = Inf,
    box.padding = 0.35,
    point.padding = 0.2,
    segment.alpha = 0.45,
    segment.size = 0.25,
    min.segment.length = 0
  ) +
  geom_errorbar(
    data = summ_manip,
    aes(x = PC1_mean, ymin = PC2_l, ymax = PC2_u, color = risk_level),
    linewidth = 0.45,
    alpha = 0.95
  ) +
  geom_errorbarh(
    data = summ_manip,
    aes(y = PC2_mean, xmin = PC1_l, xmax = PC1_u, color = risk_level),
    linewidth = 0.45,
    alpha = 0.95
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = summ_manip,
    aes(x = PC1_mean, y = PC2_mean, color = risk_level),
    size = 2.2,
    alpha = 0.98
  ) +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
  labs(
    x = "PC1",
    y = "PC2",
    subtitle = "Causal manipulations projected into PCA space",
    color = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_font_size) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.direction = "horizontal",
    legend.justification = "right",
    legend.key = element_blank()
  ) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(nrow = 1, byrow = TRUE)) + facet_wrap(~risk_dimension, scales = 'free')

p_manip_on_map_single
```

```{r}
#| label: causal_PC_space_alignment
#| include: false
#| echo: false
#| cache: true
#| out.width: "100%"
library(tidyverse)

disp_df <- segments_df %>%
  transmute(
    risk_dimension,
    dPC1 = xend - x,
    dPC2 = yend - y,
    disp_mag = sqrt(dPC1^2 + dPC2^2)
  )

load_dir_df <- load_df %>%
  mutate(
    # identify the "dimension key" that matches the manipulation CSV
    # if you have mech_col, use it; else fallback to label
    dim_key = if ("mech_col" %in% names(.)) mech_col else label,
    # remove score__ prefix to match raw keys (mh_* etc.)
    dim_key_raw = sub("^score__", "", dim_key),
    # pretty label using your same mapping
    risk_dimension = if_else(
      dim_key_raw %in% names(risk_dim_map),
      unname(risk_dim_map[dim_key_raw]),
      dim_key_raw
    )
  ) %>%
  # keep only the dimensions you actually used in manip_df
  filter(risk_dimension %in% disp_df$risk_dimension) %>%
  transmute(
    risk_dimension,
    L1 = PC1_loading,
    L2 = PC2_loading,
    load_mag = sqrt(L1^2 + L2^2)
  ) %>%
  distinct(risk_dimension, .keep_all = TRUE)

# ---- 3) Join and compute alignment statistics
align_df <- disp_df %>%
  inner_join(load_dir_df, by = "risk_dimension") %>%
  mutate(
    dot = dPC1 * L1 + dPC2 * L2,
    cos_align = dot / (disp_mag * load_mag),
    angle_deg = acos(pmin(1, pmax(-1, cos_align))) * 180 / pi
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(cos_align))


t_test <- t.test(align_df$cos_align, mu = 0)     # one-sample t-test
wilc   <- wilcox.test(align_df$cos_align, mu=0)  # nonparametric sign-rank

print(t_test)
print(wilc)

cor_mag <- cor.test(align_df$disp_mag, align_df$load_mag, method = "spearman")
print(cor_mag)

p_align <- ggplot(align_df, aes(x = reorder(risk_dimension, cos_align), y = cos_align)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.3) +
  geom_point(shape = 21, fill = "black", color = "black", stroke = group_dot_stroke, size = group_dot_size) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Directional alignment (cosine similarity)",
    title = "B",
    subtitle = "Causal manipulations in chatbot behavior align with the loading of mental-health risk scores onto the PC1–PC2 risk space in SIM-VAIL") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_font_size)

p_align
```

# Cover

**A clinically validated framework for auditing AI chatbot behavior in mental health interactions**

\vspace{1.5em}

**Veith Weilnhammer**$^{1,*}$, **Kevin YC Hou**$^{2}$, **Lennart Luettgau**$^{3}$, **Christopher Summerfield**$^{3,4}$, **Raymond Dolan**$^{1}$, **Matthew M Nour**$^{5,6,1,*}$

\vspace{0.5em}

$^{1}$ Max Planck UCL Centre for Computational Psychiatry and Ageing Research, London, UK

$^{2}$ Sydney Medical School, University of Sydney, Sydney, Australia

$^{3}$ UK AI Security Institute

$^{4}$ Department of Experimental Psychology, University of Oxford, Oxford, UK

$^{5}$ Microsoft AI, London, UK

$^{6}$ Department of Psychiatry, University of Oxford, Oxford, UK

\vspace{0.5em}

$^{*}$ Corresponding authors. Email: `matthew.nour@psych.ox.ac.uk` & `v.weilnhammer@ucl.ac.uk`

# Abstract

Millions of users turn to consumer AI chatbots to discuss emotional, behavioral, and mental-health concerns, creating an urgent need for rigorous and scalable safety evaluations. Here we introduce SIM-VAIL, a clinically validated framework for auditing chatbot behavior in mental-health contexts. SIM-VAIL simulates users with specific psychiatric vulnerabilities and conversational intents, engages them in multi-turn conversations with frontier AI chatbots (including Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, Grok and Llama models), and scores each exchange across 13 clinically grounded risk dimensions.
